Ronde van Vlaanderen Youth Day in Oudenaarde: four races, four winners
item.description: Last Sunday, we hosted the Ronde van Vlaanderen Youth Day in Oudenaarde. In bright sunshine, four races brought a full day of youth cycling action on the roads around the home of Flanders’ Finest. As part of a safety-focused test event, GeoDynamics, the Belgian specialist in real-time tracking and digital monitoring, provided 250 GPS trackers for use during the races. This was one of the first applications of its kind in youth cycling. We are very pleased that GeoDynamics is supporting this new test with an eye to the future. Congratulations to all winners: U17 Women - Aisling Charlesworth; U17 Men - Stan Jammaer; U19 Women - Lise Revol; U19 Men - Elias Wändel. KBC Bank & Verzekering, Proximus Group, KPMG Belgium, Lidl België & Luxemburg, Lotto (Nationale Loterij), Alken-Maes, Eneco Belgium, Tudor Watch, BMW Belux, Kwaremont (Brouwerij De Brabandere), MyWhoosh, Stad Oudenaarde, Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders (Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS). #SetThePace #FLCS #RVV26

item.title: NORDIS joins the partners of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour
item.description: NORDIS joins the partners of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour. FREEZE THE GAME ZERO by Nordis is the first isotonic and electrolyte ice cream in Poland, created in cooperation with Tour de Pologne. It is a light, refreshing water ice without sugar, designed for active people before, during and after effort. Each serving has only 26 kcal and selected vitamins and minerals that support daily activity. The partnership includes two versions: HYDRATION ZERO, citrus-flavoured, and ENDURANCE ZERO, forest fruit-flavoured. Sport is not only competition, but also recovery, proper hydration and daily care for the body. #TourdePologne #TdP2026 #FreezeTheGame #Nordis

One Ecuadorian can hide another | On the eve of stage 16 of the Giro d'Italia
item.description: On the eve of the all-Swiss 16th stage of the Giro d'Italia, between Bellinzona and the ski resort of Carì, with a final climb never before used in the Giro, here is a fun fact. The two Jefferson Cepedas seen at the Tour de Romandie were not a computer duplicate, as some thought from the start list for the prologue: Jefferson Alveiro Cepeda (Movistar Team) and Jefferson Alexander Cepeda (EF Pro Cycling) are cousins. Both are Ecuadorian climbers. Jefferson Alveiro Cepeda finished 7th overall at the Tour de Romandie, and until this weekend there was also a Cepeda in 7th place overall at the Giro. Some thought it was the same rider again, but it was the other cousin from EF. #TDR2026 #tdrinside #tdrnonstop #romandie #giro #tourditalie #JeffersonCepeda

item.title: Men U19 - 50 km: De Bois solo in the lead after Wolvenberg
item.description: Men U19 - 50 km: In the run-up to the third climb of Wolvenberg, Retho briefly stops because of a mechanical problem. He is quickly caught by De Bois 🇧🇪. De Bois chases down Woolley alone and, after Wolvenberg, is solo in the lead. Peloton at 12 seconds. #RVV26

item.title: Official start of Desafío Ensenada by La Vuelta
item.description: Official start of Desafío Ensenada by La Vuelta. This international competition features national and international cyclists in one of Baja California's most iconic settings: Valle de Guadalupe. It highlights Ensenada as a world-class sports tourism destination, showcasing its natural beauty, cuisine, wines, and hospitality.

item.title: The challenge has begun
item.description: Kilometer by kilometer, the desert, the fatigue, and the mind will test each participant on the way to the finish. It is not just about reaching the end; it is about proving what you are made of. Welcome to the start of Desafío México Ensenada. The adventure has only just begun. #DesafíoMéxico #Ensenada #OffRoad #Racing #DesafíoEnsenada

item.title: Celebrating the volunteers behind the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: It takes a village to bring the Santos Tour Down Under to life, and we could not do it without our incredible volunteers. As National Volunteer Week ends, we are recognising everyone who gives their time, energy, and passion to support the event year after year. This year, we are celebrating two major award winners: Volunteer of the Year Greet Kempenaers, who has been part of the volunteer family since 2019, and Traffic Marshal of the Year Debra Sutton-Smith, who has spent the past three years recruiting VIEW Clubs members to join as street marshals. Her work helps keep the race safe and raises funds for The Smith Family.

item.title: Celebrating the volunteers behind the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: It takes a village to bring the Santos Tour Down Under to life, and we could not do it without our incredible volunteers. As National Volunteer Week ends, we are recognising everyone who gives their time, energy, and passion to support the event year after year. This year, we are celebrating two major award winners: Volunteer of the Year Greet Kempenaers, who has been part of the volunteer family since 2019, and Traffic Marshal of the Year Debra Sutton-Smith, who has spent the past three years recruiting VIEW Clubs members to join as street marshals. Her work helps keep the race safe and raises funds for The Smith Family.

item.title: 2027 is going to be huge
item.description: In 2027, the men’s and women’s races will be held on the same days, on the same course, and over the same distance, creating double the action on the final three days. Full race routes will be announced in July.

item.title: Giro d’Italia 2026, Stage 14: route, favourites and where to watch it on TV
item.description: Stage 14 of the 2026 Giro d’Italia takes the riders from Aosta to Pila over 133 kilometres, with 4,350 metres of climbing. It is a stage likely to cause another major shake-up in the general classification.

item.title: Alberto Bettiol: from the cobbles of Flanders to the magic of Verbania
item.description: Alberto Bettiol (XDS Astana) won in Verbania, the finish of Stage 13 of the 2026 Giro d’Italia, after the 15-rider breakaway was decided by a powerful attack on the Tudor Timed Climb of Ungiasca.

item.title: Stage 2 of the Vuelta a Burgos Féminas
Tour de Pologne route presentation on Tuesday, May 26 at 6:30 p.m. on TVP Sport
item.description: On Tuesday, May 26 at 6:30 p.m. on TVP Sport, we will officially unveil the route of the 83rd edition of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour. This year’s race slogan is “North–South,” and fans can expect the biggest stars of world cycling and big emotions on the route from August 3 to 9. Two stages have already been announced: from Gdynia to Koszalin, and the return to the Lubusz Voivodeship after 22 years on the Gorzów Wielkopolski–Zielona Góra route. During the broadcast, we will also present the route of the 4th Tour de Pologne Women, which will take place entirely in the Lublin Voivodeship. @sport_tvppl @GrupaORLEN @totalizator_sp @Decathlon Polska

item.title: Tour de Pologne 2026 route presentation on Tuesday, May 26 at 18:30 on TVP Sport
item.description: On Tuesday, May 26 at 18:30 on TVP Sport, the route of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour will be officially unveiled. This year’s race slogan is "North–South," and fans can expect the biggest stars of world cycling and major emotions on the route from August 3 to 9. Two stages have already been announced: Gdynia to Koszalin, and a return to the Lubusz Voivodeship after 22 years on the Gorzów Wielkopolski to Zielona Góra route. During the broadcast, the route of the 4th Tour de Pologne Women will also be presented; it will take place entirely in the Lublin Voivodeship.

item.title: New stages and a new format for the final three days of racing
item.description: Stuey and Carlee are on the road with a first look at the new format for the 2027 Santos Tour Down Under. The men’s and women’s pelotons will share the final weekend stage, with two starts and two finishes. Read more from Stuey: https://bit.ly/4wKdLXd

item.title: New stages and a new format for the final three days of racing
item.description: Stuey and Carlee are on the road with a first look at the new format for the 2027 Santos Tour Down Under. The men’s and women’s pelotons will share the final weekend stage, with two starts and two finishes. More details are available at the link in bio. Subscribe to the newsletter to be the first to hear when the race routes are released in July. @santos_ltd #TourDownUnder

item.title: A new era for the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: The Santos Tour Down Under will enter a new era next year. For the first time at WorldTour level, the men’s and women’s races will be held on the same days, on the same course and over the same distance. The UCI WorldTour season opens with six men’s stages from Tuesday to Sunday, with the UCI Women’s WorldTour joining for three stages from Friday. Full details: bit.ly/4uqif3J @SantosLtd #TourDownUnder

item.title: A new era for the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: The Santos Tour Down Under will enter a new era next year. For the first time at WorldTour level, the men’s and women’s races will be held on the same days, on the same course and over the same distance. The UCI WorldTour season opens with six men’s stages from Tuesday to Sunday, with the UCI Women’s WorldTour joining for three stages from Friday. Full details: bit.ly/4uqif3J

item.title: A new era for the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: The Santos Tour Down Under will enter a new era next year. For the first time at WorldTour level, the men’s and women’s races will be held on the same days, on the same course and over the same distance. The UCI WorldTour season opens with six men’s stages from Tuesday to Sunday, with the UCI Women’s WorldTour joining for three stages from Friday. For fans, that means two races on the same day over the final three days, with two starts and two finishes, and the chance to watch the world’s best men and women pass by within hours of each other. Full details: https://bit.ly/4uqif3J

item.title: A new era for the Santos Tour Down Under
item.description: The Santos Tour Down Under will enter a new era next year. For the first time at WorldTour level, the men’s and women’s races will be held on the same days, on the same course and over the same distance. The UCI WorldTour season opens with six men’s stages from Tuesday to Sunday, with the UCI Women’s WorldTour joining for three stages from Friday to Sunday. For fans, that means two races on the same day over the final three days, with two starts and two finishes, and the chance to watch the world’s best men and women pass by within hours of each other. Head to the link in bio for full details. @santos_ltd #TourDownUnder

item.title: Eschborn-Frankfurt 2026 highlights
item.description: A look back at the best moments of Radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt 2026. The event brought together 12,000 amateur cyclists, international top-level professionals, young talents, and inclusive cycling. Thanks to the partners, volunteers, helpers, fans, host cities, and emergency crews who made the day possible. Video by @be_eppic.

item.title: UCI Road World Championships Montréal 2026 team takes part in the Tour du Silence
item.description: The team for the UCI Road World Championships Montréal 2026 and the Grands Prix Cyclistes is proud to have taken part in the Tour du Silence, alongside the FQSC - Fédération québécoise des sports cyclistes. Through our presence, we wanted to pay tribute to cyclists who have died and to remind everyone of the importance of sharing the road, safety, and respect for all who travel by bike.

item.title: UCI Road World Championships Montréal 2026 and GPCQM team takes part in the Tour du Silence
item.description: The team for the UCI Road World Championships Montréal 2026 and the GPCQM is proud to have taken part in the Tour du Silence, alongside @fqsc_sportscyclistes. Through our presence, we wanted to pay tribute to cyclists who have died and to remind everyone of the importance of sharing the road, safety, and respect for all who travel by bike.

item.title: UCI Cyclo-cross World Championships Oostende 2027 to celebrate cyclo-cross on the Belgian coast
item.description: The UCI Cyclo-cross World Championships in Oostende will take place from 29 to 31 January 2027 and promise a spectacular celebration of cyclo-cross on the Belgian coast. With our partner brochure, we invite brands and organisations to be part of a world-class sporting event with international visibility and unforgettable fan engagement. Ready to ride this story together with Toerisme Oostende vzw and Flanders Classics? Download the full brochure in the link below. #FLCS #SetThePace #Ostend2027

item.title: New episode of the Official La Vuelta Podcast: Equipo Kern Pharma returns with ambition intact
item.description: New episode of the Official La Vuelta Podcast. Equipo Kern Pharma returns to La Vuelta with ambition intact. We talk with Urko Berrade and Ibón Ruiz about their feelings and the memories of an unforgettable 2024 edition, when the team won three stage victories. item.title: On to the next stage! En route to the Tour de Romandie Gourmet Stage 🚴‍♂️🥐
item.description: On to the next stage! En route to the Tour de Romandie Gourmet Stage 🚴‍♂️🥐 Fans of cycling, food lovers, entrepreneurs, and decision-makers from Romandie: do not miss the event where sport, gastronomy, local produce, and networking meet. The setting at Fairmont Le Montreux Palace awaits. TDR2026 was marked by Tadej Pogačar, incredible public enthusiasm, and TV images broadcast in 181 countries. It confirmed that the #TDR is much more than a race: it is an international showcase, an economic driver, and a strong symbol of Romand identity.

item.title: On to the next stage! 💛 The Étape Gourmande of the Tour de Romandie is coming up 🚴♂️🥐
item.description: Cycling fans, food lovers, entrepreneurs, and decision-makers from Romandy: don't miss the event where sport, gastronomy, local products, and networking come together. The majestic and glamorous setting of Fairmont Le Montreux Palace awaits you. The exceptional success of #TdR2026 — driven by Tadej Pogačar's brilliance, incredible public enthusiasm, and TV images broadcast in 181 countries — has confirmed it: much more than a race, the #TDR is an international showcase, an economic driver, and a strong symbol of our Romandy identity. ✨ Limited places: register to take part. Sign up here: 👉 https://lnkd.in/e_3cgzUk We look forward to sharing this stage, and the amazing memories of this #TDR2026, with you! #TourDeRomandie #ÉtapeGourmande #Romandie #Cyclisme #BusinessNetworking #Pogacar #TDR2026 #FiertéRomande #TDRnonstop #TDRinside #RomandieForEver Chassot Concept SA

item.title: 💛 Thank you to the Club Maillot Jaune and all its members for riding with the Tour de Romandie 💛
item.description: And... see you at the Étape Gourmande on 19 June 2026. To register yourself or your company — a great idea for an outing combining sport and gastronomy: 👉🏻 https://lnkd.in/e_3cgzUk

item.title: A day to remember in the Basque Country
item.description: A day to remember in the Basque Country. From Nikola Nosková’s long solo breakaway to the explosive attacks on the final climbs, Stage 2 at @ehitzulia was a tactical masterpiece. Relive the intensity through our lens: the misty peaks, the relentless pace of the pack, and the crowning moment for @dominika__wlodarczyk, taking her first-ever WorldTour victory in a nail-biting finish! 🇵🇱🏆 📸 @gettysport #UCIWWT #ItzuliaWomen2026

item.title: Lloyds Tour of Britain Men 2025 finale in Cardiff
item.description: Our 2025 rewind ends in Cardiff, where the Lloyds Tour of Britain Men finished in spectacular style. Olav Kooij won Stage 6 and secured the points jersey. Romain Grégoire took the overall GC victory and the young rider title. Victor Vercouillie won the KOM classification. Bahrain Victorious topped the teams. Oscar Onley delivered a strong ride to finish as best British rider. Geraint Thomas brought the curtain down on his career in an emotional moment. A brilliant finish to an unforgettable edition of the Tour of Britain Men.

item.title: Our new T-shirt, created with Cikkel Copenhagen
item.description: Take a look at our brand-new T-shirt, created in collaboration with Cikkel Copenhagen. There are two different styles: 1. With the beautiful SMK - Statens Museum for Kunst building in the city center and Copenhagen Sprint stripes, available in off-white and classic navy blue. 2. Cikkel Copenhagen's two mascots oTTo and oTTina dressed in sprint colors, available in navy blue and heather gray. We hope you like them as much as we do. You can pre-order on Cikkel's website or find the new T-shirts in the official Copenhagen Sprint shop in the finish area during race weekend.

100 days until the grand départ of @lavuelta 2026
item.description: 100 days until the start of @lavuelta 2026. The Prince's Palace of Monaco was lit up in red, the iconic color of the Spanish race, to mark the countdown to the grand départ on 22-23 August 2026. A symbolic moment celebrating one of the major events on the international cycling calendar in the heart of Monaco. Photo: Frédéric Nebinger / Palais princier / Stéphane Danna

item.title: Netcompany is now an Official Partner of Copenhagen Sprint
item.description: Netcompany is now an Official Partner of Copenhagen Sprint. Two weeks ago, the news broke about Danish company Netcompany's major agreement with Team INEOS. Today we can also reveal that Netcompany is joining Copenhagen Sprint as an Official Partner. We are incredibly happy and proud to welcome Netcompany as an Official Partner. This underlines their strong commitment to cycling, and now that commitment will be even more visible on home soil when the world's elite returns to Denmark. Welcome aboard! 🚴

item.title: Equal prize money for women and men at Tour de Pologne? It is becoming a reality.
item.description: Equal prize money for women and men at Tour de Pologne? It is becoming a reality. This was one of the topics of the panel “From diversity to belonging” during #ImpactCEE, thanks to the commitment and support of @totalizator_sp. Totalizator Sportowy (@totalizator_sp) First day of #ImpactCEE is behind us! It was intense. From discussions about the economy and security to debates on technology, leadership, social resilience, and balance in a world of constant availability. Beata Stelmach, President of our company, took part in two panels: in “Europe in a new balance of power: economy, security and the future of growth,” she spoke about Europe's place in a changing world, the importance of economic security, and directions for Poland's further growth, also in the context of the country's huge transformation after joining the European Union. During the discussion “From diversity to belonging,” she emphasized the importance of equality and real support for women in sport, referring to Tour de Pologne Women and equal prize money for female and male riders. Mariusz Kaczmarek, Managing Director of the Digital Transformation Division, addressed cybersecurity, digital sovereignty, and the new challenges technology poses for organizations. Radosław Kietliński, Advisor to the Management Board of Totalizator Sportowy, took part in the moderated discussion “From fear to action. How do we build social resilience in times of uncertainty?” Marek Orzechowski, President of the LOTTO Foundation named after Halina Konopacka, spoke about the value of being offline, the need to set boundaries, and finding balance in times of constant availability. Another important moment of the day was the presentation of the Money Impact 2026 Award, of which we were a partner. The award was presented by Mariusz Kaczmarek, Managing Director of the Digital Transformation Division #TotalizatorSportowy. See you tomorrow. #WygrywamyRazem #Impact26 Video — https://x.com/totalizator_sp/status/2054624417192313309 — Tour de Pologne (@Tour_de_Pologne) May 13, 2026

item.title: Tour de Pologne returns to Lubuskie after 22 years
item.description: Tour de Pologne returns to Lubuskie after 22 years. On 5 August, stage 3 of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour will run from @miasto_gorzow to Zielona Góra. At a press conference in @miasto_zielona_gora, the stage route was officially presented. It will pass through scenic forests, lakes, and the area around Lubuskie vineyards. Czesław Lang stressed that the race is not only top-level sport, but also promotion for the regions seen by fans in 65 countries around the world. This will be one of the biggest sporting events of summer 2026 in @lubuskie.pl. Read more on our website. The race's title sponsor is @grupaorlen. Strategic partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour is @lotto.pl @totalizator_sportowy #WygrywamyRazem 📸 @andrzej_gucwa #TourdePologne #TdP2026 #Lubuskie

item.title: Tour de Pologne returns to Lubuskie after 22 years
item.description: On August 5, stage 3 of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour will run from Gorzów to Zielona Góra. The stage route was presented at a press conference in Zielona Góra and will pass through forests, lakes, and the Lubuskie vineyards. Czesław Lang said the race is not only top-level sport, but also a way to promote the regions seen by fans in 65 countries. It will be one of the biggest sporting events of summer 2026 in Lubuskie.

item.title: New for 2026: Grand Prix Cycliste de Montréal grandstands
item.description: The new Grand Prix Cycliste de Montréal grandstands offer a seated place, a clear view of the peloton, and privileged access just steps from the finish line. Two strategically placed areas will provide a spectacular, comfortable, and memorable experience. Features include covered grandstands, assigned seats, giant screens, and an on-site food area. Only 300 pre-sale tickets are available, starting at $108.

In Flanders Fields Youth Day in Ieper
item.description: Last Sunday, we hosted the In Flanders Fields Youth Day in Stad Ieper. Five races took place on the roads of the Great War, with wins for Cameron Rogers in U23 Men, Laly Pichon in U19 Women, Rostislav Novolodskii in U19 Men, Aisling Charlesworth in U17 Women, and Lars Peers in U17 Men. Thanks to everyone involved and to our partners: KBC Bank & Verzekering, Proximus Group, KPMG Belgium, Lidl België & Luxemburg, Lotto (Nationale Loterij), Alken-Maes, Eneco Belgium, Tudor Watch, BMW Belux, Kwaremont (Brouwerij De Brabandere), MyWhoosh, Stad Ieper, Sport Vlaanderen, and Cycling in Flanders (Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS).

item.title: Decathlon Polska returns to Tour de Pologne and ORLEN Lang Team Race
item.description: Decathlon Polska returns to Tour de Pologne and ORLEN Lang Team Race. The French brand has become the Official Sponsor of the Team Classification for the 83rd edition of the race, as well as the Sports Partner of the ORLEN Lang Team Race series and ORLEN Tour de Pologne Amateurs – the Ryszard Szurkowski Memorial. Through its cooperation with Lang Team, the brand will be present both during the professional race and at the amateur events in Hotel Arłamów, BUKOVINA Resort, and Bytów, where participants will be able to use, among other things, Decathlon’s expo zone and technical service. Read more on our website. ✅

item.title: Tour de Romandie Féminin 2026 postponed to 2027
item.description: The decision has been made to postpone the 2026 edition of the Tour de Romandie Féminin to 2027. The reasons given are the crowded calendar of major events in Romandy and a lack of sponsorship, despite advanced discussions. See you in 2027.

item.title: Tour de Romandie Féminin 2026 postponed to 2027
item.description: The 2026 edition of the Tour de Romandie Féminin has been postponed to 2027. Richard Chassot, director and organizer of the Tour de Romandie, had already suggested after the men’s #TDR2026 that a postponement of the women’s race was likely. The Tour de Romandie Foundation and Chassot Concept SA announced that the decision has now been made. Logistical and financial reasons, including a crowded calendar of major events in Romandy and a lack of sponsorship despite several advanced contacts, led to this “reasonable and responsible” postponement. The race will return in 2027.

item.title: Tour de Romandie Féminin 2026 postponed to 2027
item.description: The 2026 edition of the Tour de Romandie Féminin has been postponed to 2027. Richard Chassot, director and organizer of the Tour de Romandie, had already suggested after the men’s #TDR2026 that a postponement of the women’s race was likely. The Tour de Romandie Foundation and Chassot Concept SA announced that the decision has now been made. Logistical and financial reasons, including a crowded calendar of major events in Romandy and a lack of sponsorship despite many advanced contacts, led to this “reasonable and responsible” postponement. The race will return in 2027.

Press conference aboard ORP Błyskawica launches Stage 1 of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour
item.description: A press conference launching Stage 1 of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour was held aboard ORP Błyskawica. This year’s edition, under the slogan “North–South,” will begin on 3 August, and the opening stage will run from Gdynia to Koszalin Centrum Pomorza over 234 km. During the event, the LOTTO intermediate sprints in Kartuzy, Bytów and Polanów were presented, along with special bonuses in Parchowo, Kołczygłowy and Kępice, and the first mountain prize on Góra Chełmska. Czesław Lang, General Director of Tour de Pologne, said that Pomerania has always been an important part of Tour de Pologne history and his personal history, and that he is pleased the 83rd edition will start there. Main sponsor of the race is ORLEN. Strategic partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour is LOTTO / Totalizator Sportowy.

item.title: Copenhagen Sprint receives UCI sustainability award
item.description: Copenhagen Sprint is proud to share that it has received the UCI sustainability award at the UCI Cycling for All & Sustainability Awards in Athens. The award recognizes the event’s work to develop a more responsible and sustainable international cycling race from its first edition. Head of Event Delivery Freja Fischer-Møller accepted the award on behalf of Copenhagen Sprint. In 2025, the event launched its sustainability strategy with a focus on: 100% electric race cars, waste sorting and recycling, more climate-friendly catering and less food waste, green transport and public transport, phasing out diesel generators, and upcycling and reuse of materials and merchandise. The event is still young, and there is much work ahead. Copenhagen Sprint says collaboration, transparency, and knowledge sharing are essential to creating more sustainable sporting events in the future. It also thanks the UCI, as well as all municipalities, partners, suppliers, volunteers, and teams helping move the event in a greener direction.

Men's Stage Five takes us to The Tumble
item.description: Men's Stage Five takes us to The Tumble. Remco Evenepoel powered away to a brilliant stage win, Romain Grégoire moved into both the GC and young rider jerseys, and Olav Kooij continued his lead in the points classification. Victor Vercouillie shone on the steep slopes to take the KOM jersey. What a stage! 💚

item.title: Drone footage from the Tour de Romandie
item.description: Did you miss these immersive drone images from the Tour de Romandie? They captured the spectacular descent of the Jaun during the Broc–Charmey stage, with the climb of the pass three times from three different roads. An exceptional UCI exemption made this collaboration possible between @radiotelevisionsuisse and the local organizers. The live broadcast also included a costume contest. #tdr2026 #tdrinside #tdrnonstop

item.title: Drone footage from the Tour de Romandie
item.description: These immersive drone images from the Tour de Romandie captured the spectacular descent of the Jaun Pass during the Broc–Charmey stage and its triple ascent from three different routes. An UCI exemption allowed this collaboration between RADIO TELEVISION SUISSE (RTS) and the local organizers.

Images that say a lot about Broc and Charmey
item.description: These images say a lot: a region behind its event, an incredible crowd along the roads between Broc and Charmey, and a team that has worked for months to make it possible. The Tour de Romandie is top-level sport, and this weekend it also showcased the Gruyère region internationally. Proud of the work achieved together and grateful to everyone who helped bring this project to life. www.tdr2026-gruyere.ch Benoît Bussard photo credit Journal La Gruyère Tour de Romandie Commune Val-de-Charmey Commune de Broc

item.title: The pros raced for victory in the Taunus on May 1, while the next generation took over downtown Frankfurt
item.description: The pros raced for victory in the Taunus on May 1, while the next generation took over downtown Frankfurt. More than 450 children and teenagers showed around Opernplatz how vibrant, diverse, and exciting the future of cycling can be. A total of 300 children aged two to twelve took part in the kinder Joy of Moving mini tour, gaining their first road cycling experience in the balance bike race, the Kids Bike Parade, and on Opernplatz with former pro Jens Voigt. At the Süwag Energie Youth Cup, 154 young riders from the U11 to U17 categories competed under professional race conditions. The VGF inclusion race also made a strong statement, with 32 students with and without disabilities taking on the course together. The message was clear: everyone belongs in the peloton.

item.title: TDR drew record audiences like never before. The 79th Tour de Romandie, boosted by the Tadej Pogacar effect, captivated French-speaking Switzerland with record TV ratings, huge media coverage, and social media videos reaching more than 1 and even 2 million views.
item.description: The 79th Tour de Romandie set records across the board: strong roadside crowds, major media coverage, and social media videos with more than 1 million and even 2 million views. TV figures were also impressive, with more than 200,000 viewers on RTS 2, an average of 38,000 per stage, a 30.7% market share, and a peak of 104,000 for the finish in Leysin. Richard Chassot said these results should please sponsors and may attract new partners. The Tour de Romandie confirmed its status as a major event in world cycling.

item.title: TDR drew record audiences like never before. The 79th Tour de Romandie, boosted by the Tadej Pogacar effect, captivated French-speaking Switzerland with record TV ratings, huge media coverage, and social media videos reaching more than 1 and even 2 million views.
item.description: The 79th Tour de Romandie set records across the board: strong roadside crowds, major media coverage, and social media videos with more than 1 million and even 2 million views. TV figures were also impressive, with more than 200,000 viewers on RTS 2, an average of 38,000 per stage, a 30.7% market share, and a peak of 104,000 for the finish in Leysin. Richard Chassot said these results should please sponsors and may attract new partners. The Tour de Romandie confirmed its status as a major event in world cycling.

item.title: TDR drew record audiences like never before. The 79th Tour de Romandie, won by Tadej Pogacar, generated record numbers in attendance, media coverage, social media, and TV audiences.
item.description: The 79th Tour de Romandie, won by Tadej Pogacar, generated record figures in every area: public attendance, media presence, social media, and TV audiences. In French-speaking Switzerland, RTS 2 reached 202,000 viewers for at least 15 consecutive minutes, with an average of 38,000 viewers per stage and a 30.7% average market share. The final on Sunday at 16:15 in Leysin peaked at 104,000 viewers. The show "Autour du Tour" also performed well, averaging 21,000 viewers and a 16% market share. Richard Chassot said the figures reflect the public's strong attachment to the race and may help attract more partners. The Tour de Romandie continues to stand out well beyond sport and remains a major event on the Swiss and international calendar.

item.title: Tour de Romandie TV audiences confirm the event’s growing impact
item.description: TV audiences for the 79th Tour de Romandie in Switzerland confirm the growth driven by the Tadej Pogačar effect. The event recorded record spectator numbers, strong media coverage, and major impact on social media, with some videos reaching more than 1 million and even 2 million views. More than 200,000 people in French-speaking Switzerland watched the Tour on RTS 2 for at least 15 consecutive minutes. The prologue and five stages produced an average audience of 38,000 and an average market share of 30.7%, another increase after the success of 2025. A peak audience of 104,000 was reached on Sunday at 16:15 during the final finish in Leysin. Richard Chassot said the figures show the strong connection between the French-speaking public and the race, and that the quality of the organization, the routes, and the field of champions help deliver these results. The Tour de Romandie continues to confirm its place as a key event on the international calendar.

item.title: Tour de Romandie ends with final general classification
item.description: The Tour de Romandie has come to an end after six intense days of racing. Banque du Léman was proud to support the riders and present the White Jersey for Best Young Rider at each stage. Congratulations to all the participants, and thanks to Bruno Laurent, Lucas HEINTZ, and Antoine MEDEZ for the final jersey presentations of the week. Final classification: 1. Tadej POGACAR (UAE TEAM EMIRATES XRG) 2. Florian LIPOWITZ (RED BULL - BORA - HANSGROHE) 3. Lenny MARTINEZ (BAHRAIN VICTORIOUS).

item.title: Tour de Romandie: racing at home means everything
item.description: Nothing compares to racing at home, surrounded by the energy and support of the local crowds. Year after year, Tudor Pro Cycling continues to grow, both in results and in the hearts of the fans. As a rider, I always felt the extra power that kind of support can give. As a team owner, the feeling is different but just as meaningful. Seeing kids, families, cameras, and microphones gathered around our team fills me with pride and reinforces the belief that we are building something truly significant for cycling in Switzerland. I am already looking forward to GP Gippingen and Tour de Suisse Rad AG next month. But first: the Giro d'Italia.

item.title: Fabian Cancellara on the Tour de Romandie
item.description: In Broc, Fabian Cancellara says the Tour de Romandie is true cycling. He left his mark there with the yellow jersey after the 2003 Geneva prologue and later won the points jersey in his first participation. He recalls strong memories, demanding routes, and a crowd everywhere, all the time. He also says that #TDR2026 is not only about Tadej Pogačar. Tudor Pro Cycling was also present with Yannis Voisard, best Swiss rider, and Roland Thalmann, mountain jersey. #tdrnonstop #romandie #tdrinside #Romandie #cyclismesuisse

item.title: Welcome, Flanders Classics
item.description: Flanders Classics is a major force in professional cycling, organizing some of the sport’s most iconic races, from the Ronde van Vlaanderen to the UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup and the Telenet Superprestige. It will now improve media and digital content operations with ScorePlay. Every sprint, climb, and finish-line moment, in photo and video, will be centralized and accessible through the platform to help tell stories faster and connect fans, partners, and riders. #ForSportsBySports

End-of-day clip-clap: 3 beats, 3 moves
item.description: A closing clip-clap to frame the super slow-motion of Tadej Pogačar’s fourth victory at #TDR2026, including the iconic moment when Pogi high-fived Mauro Gianetti. It captures the emotions, energy, teamwork, and spectacle of an unforgettable week. Images and editing: Robin Rufener. With Lidl Schweiz - Suisse - Svizzera, Primeo Energie, Banque du Léman, Loterie Romande, RADIO TELEVISION SUISSE (RTS), RTS Sport, Caffè Chicco D'Oro, Tissot, UAE Team Emirates, and Chassot Concept SA.

item.title: Final clip from a dream week
item.description: Final clip from a dream week. It begins in the lively atmosphere of the race caravan, with music, smiles, and the unique energy that signals something special is happening. Then comes a suspended moment: the slow-motion image of Tadej Pogacar’s fourth victory and Pogi’s simple gesture, a hand slap with Mauro Gianetti, at UAE Team Emirates - XRG. Finally, the scene fades, the pace quickens, the behind-the-scenes work takes over, and everything is dismantled as quickly as it was built. Three moments to close a week of raw emotion, collective energy, and unforgettable scenes. Images and editing: Robin Rufener - TDR press service / Chassot Concept SA.

Three days later, still unbelievable: Georg Zimmermann wins Eschborn-Frankfurt
item.description: Three days later, it is still unbelievable, but true. Georg Zimmermann wins the #radklassiker. A German victory at Eschborn-Frankfurt, and a moment that is still hard to take in days later. These images say it all: disbelief, emotion, and victory. Congratulations again, Georg. What a race.

item.title: Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour: safety is a top priority
item.description: Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour is not only about sporting excitement, but above all about the highest safety standards. For years, Lang Team has worked with the Belgian company Boplan Group, which provides innovative safety systems, from shock-absorbing screens to protective totems. These solutions are used in industry and at airports and are recognized worldwide. For the sixth time, BOPLAN’s distinctive yellow elements will appear on the Tour de Pologne route, underlining one thing: rider safety always comes first.

item.title: Yannis Voisard finishes 13th and is the best Swiss rider at the 2026 Tour de Romandie
item.description: Yannis Voisard, 8th in Leysin, finishes 13th overall and is the best Swiss rider at the 2026 Tour de Romandie. The rider from Jura, @yannisvoisard of @tudorprocycling, who had already posted a top-20 result, finishes a strong 13th overall. He battled with the best riders, especially in the final of the last stage to Leysin, where he placed 8th. He wins the best Swiss rider award from @radiotelevisionsuisse and will now prepare for the Critérium du Dauphiné Libéré. (TDR press service - 2026).

Tadej Pogačar crowns Tour de Romandie 2026 with four stage wins
item.description: Tadej Pogačar won the general classification and the points classification at the Tour de Romandie 2026, and matched Ferdi Kübler’s 1951 record with four stage victories. French champion Dorian Godon, winner of the prologue and stage 3, also played a major role in the race. Florian Lipowitz and Lenny Martinez, who was the best young rider, completed the podium. Swiss rider Roland Thalmann won the mountains classification. Best Swiss rider Yannis Voisard finished 13th, while Jakob Söderkvist was named the most combative rider. Stage wins: Lidl Schweiz - Suisse - Svizzera. Points classification: Loterie Romande. Mountains classification: Primeo Energie. Best young rider: Banque du Léman. Best Swiss rider: RADIO TELEVISION SUISSE (RTS). Combativity prize: Caffè Chicco D'Oro.

item.title: Roland Thalmann wins the Primeo Energie mountain classification at the 2026 Tour de Romandie
item.description: Swiss rider Roland Thalmann usually works for his leader at Tudor Pro Cycling Team. His breakaway on the first stage put him in a different position, and he held on to the white jersey with blue polka dots for the mountain classification until the end. It is his first distinctive jersey in an UCI WorldTour race.

item.title: Tadej Pogačar crowned at the 2026 Tour de Romandie
item.description: Tadej Pogačar won the general classification and the points classification at the 2026 Tour de Romandie, and he did not do things by halves. He matched Ferdi Kübler’s 1951 record with four stage wins. French champion Dorian Godon, winner of the prologue and stage 3, was another standout rider and likely helped prevent that record from being broken. Florian Lipowitz and Lenny Martinez, the best young rider of the race, completed the podium. Swiss rider Roland Thalmann took the mountain jersey. Best Swiss rider Yannis Voisard finished a strong 13th. Jakob Söderkvist was named the most combative rider of the edition. Stage wins: Lidl Schweiz - Suisse - Svizzera. Points classification: Loterie Romande. Mountain classification: Primeo Energie. Best young rider classification: Banque du Léman. Best Swiss rider prize: RADIO TELEVISION SUISSE (RTS). Combativity prize: Caffè Chicco D'Oro.

item.title: Roland Thalmann wins the Primeo Energie mountain classification at the 2026 Tour de Romandie
item.description: Swiss rider Roland Thalmann usually works for his leader at Tudor Pro Cycling Team. His breakaway on the first stage put him in a different position, and he fought to keep the blue-and-white polka-dot mountain jersey until the end. It is his first distinctive jersey in an UCI WorldTour race.

item.title: Tadej Pogačar wins the 2026 Tour de Romandie
item.description: Mission accomplished for Tadej Pogačar, who wins the 2026 Tour de Romandie with a fourth stage victory on the final stage from Lucens to Leysin. The Slovenian rider from UAE Team Emirates is delighted after a week in which he enjoyed Romandie and its fantastic crowd. He equals Ferdi Kübler’s record of four stage wins in the same edition and also takes the Jouez Sport! sprint jersey from Loterie Romande.

item.title: Unstoppable Tadej Pogačar wins the Tour de Romandie
item.description: Tadej Pogačar won the Tour de Romandie on his first participation, taking the final stage as well. In a thrilling finish full of attacks and counterattacks with Florian Lipowitz, the four-time Tour de France winner made the difference in the sprint to add another line to his palmarès. Pogačar won four of the five stages of this 79th edition of the Tour de Romandie and, with his victory in Leysin, matched Ferdi Kübler’s record of four stage wins in 1951. He finished 42 seconds ahead of Lipowitz. Apart from the prologue, he was only one stage away from a Grand Slam, as he finished fourth on stage 3. Before the Tour de France, he will return to Switzerland for the Tour de Suisse, held from 17 to 21 June.

item.title: So wonderful!
item.description: So wonderful! They were seen in 180 countries! Here are the FPV drone images of the attack by @tadejpogacar and @uae_team_emirates on the final of the three climbs of the Col du Jaun. A performance by @upperview_prod in partnership with the @tourderomandie and @radiotelevisionsuisse. @tdr26broccharmey #romandie #tdrnonstop #romandieforever #tdrinside

item.title: Tadej Pogačar takes his third win!
item.description: Tadej Pogačar, the Slovenian world champion, won the queen stage of the Tour de Romandie ahead of Florian Lipowitz. The gap to the German rider was just 14 seconds at the finish in Charmey. In the general classification, Pogačar now leads his German rival by 35 seconds before the final stage between Lucens and Leysin. Lenny Martinez, third overall, is 2:17 behind. @keystone_sda_ats #TDR #TDRNONSTOP #TDR2026 @banque_du_leman @loterieromande @caffechiccodoro @radiotelevisionsuisse @lidlch @decathlon_ch @primeo_energie

item.title: Three wins for Tadej Pogačar
item.description: The podium remains unchanged, with Florian Lipowitz second at 35 seconds and Lenny Martinez third at 2:23. Yannis Voisard rode a superb queen stage, finishing sixth at 1:47 behind the stage winner. #tdr #tdr2026 #tdrnonstop #romandie #tdrinside

item.title: "The canton of Fribourg is living days of grace"
item.description: Philippe Demierre, president of the Fribourg Government, shares his pleasure and emotion at the start of the queen stage of the Tour de Romandie, which he will experience from the inside. A first for him. "Fribourg and the Gruyère region will shine magnificently." Have a great day, everyone. #TDR #romandieforever #Romandie #Gruyère #Fribourg Etat de Fribourg - Staat Freiburg

item.title: Should May 1 always be like this?
item.description: @eschbornfrankfurt was absolutely brilliant! Even though I was really nervous beforehand. For me, it was my third major cycling event, and after starting further and further back last year to watch it, I started in Eschborn from block E this time. It was not as chaotic as I had imagined. The course was nice and varied, and the atmosphere was great. #rennrad #sport #eschbornfrankfurt #radsport Werbung Einladung

item.title: GODON, THE TEAM'S VICTORY
item.description: We may have written him off too quickly. Dropped on the Col du Mollendruz, @godondorian of @ineosgrenadiers benefited from outstanding work by his teammates to rejoin the peloton on the descent to Orbe. Fresher than the day before, the French champion then gave his rivals no chance and claimed his 6th victory of the season, his 2nd in this edition of the Tour de Romandie. “This is probably one of the best wins of my career because it was built as a team.” 📸@keystone_sda_ats #TDR #TDR2026 #TDRNONSTOP #ROMANDIE @caffechiccodoro @loterieromande @banque_du_leman @radiotelevisionsuisse @primeo_energie @decathlon_ch

item.title: What a day! Racing at home is always special, but today was something else. The whole course was lined with spectators, the atmosphere was sensational, and the route was even tougher than in previous years. Perfect conditions to extend my contract for another year. Yes, you read that right: the most important thing for me today is that it is now clear when I will stop. As of today, it is certain that 2027 will be my last year in the WorldTour. I am looking forward to it, and from now on I will enjoy days like today even more.
item.description: What a day! Racing at home is always special, but today was something else. The whole course was lined with spectators, the atmosphere was sensational, and the route was even tougher than in previous years. Perfect conditions to extend my contract for another year. Yes, you read that right: the most important thing for me today is that it is now clear when I will stop. As of today, it is certain that 2027 will be my last year in the WorldTour. I am looking forward to it, and from now on I will enjoy days like today even more. #dege #dgnklb

item.title: Lloyds Tour of Britain Women 2025 ends in Glasgow
item.description: Our 2025 rewind reaches its finale in Glasgow, where the Lloyds Tour of Britain Women finished in spectacular style. Ally Wollaston held on to win the general classification by four seconds. Cat Ferguson swept the points, young rider, and British rider classifications. Lorena Wiebes added a seventh stage win to her Tour tally. Dominika Włodarczyk conquered the climbs to take the queen of the mountains classification. Kristen Faulkner was named most combative overall. A brilliant finish to an unforgettable edition.

item.title: With eVISO, TotA energy continues after the race
item.description: With @eviso_giro, the energy of TotA continues even after the race. Turn your rides into energy that can be deducted from your electricity bill with eVISO. eVISO giro turns movement into Wh, allowing each athlete to charge a virtual battery inside the app. The app is available on the App Store and Google Play. Photo: Van Asch/Matassoni. #TotA #LiveUphill

item.title: Tour de Rosbacher starts on May 1
item.description: If you are riding the ADAC Velotour, you can make your ride count twice: track your ride on May 1 in Komoot and join the Tour de Rosbacher. That gives you a chance to win a road bike worth 7,500 euros. You can also help collect kilometers for a good cause. If we reach 50,000 km, Rosbacher will donate 30,000 euros to the Stiftung Deutsche Sporthilfe. More information: https://www.rosbacher-aktion.de/

item.title: Two wins from two for Tadej Pogačar at the Tour de Romandie
item.description: Two wins from two for Tadej Pogačar at the Tour de Romandie in Switzerland.

item.title: Press conference with stage winner Tadej Pogačar after the stage from Rue to Vucherens
item.description: Press conference with Tadej Pogačar, winner of the stage from Rue to Vucherens (173.1 km), after he had already raised his arms yesterday. Tadej Pogačar beat Dorian Godon and Finn Fisher-Black in the sprint to win the second stage. Watch the full press conference on YouTube.

item.title: Second stage, second victory for Tadej Pogačar
item.description: In an unpredictable, demanding stage with 3,104 meters of climbing, Tadej Pogačar beat everyone, including Dorian Godon in second and Finn Fisher-Black in third, in the final sprint in Vucherens. Another brilliant win: it is even stronger with the yellow jersey on his shoulders. Tomorrow is stage 3, with the answer to come in Orbe. Pogačar also took the JouezSport points jersey from Loterie Romande. After the withdrawals of Mauro Schmid, who was ill, and Joël Suter, three Swiss riders remain in the race, including Roland Thalmann, the current Primeo Energie mountains leader, and the Romands Yannis Voisard, best Swiss rider (8th on the stage and 17th overall), and Robin Donze, 48th. The most combative rider of the day was Italy's Filippo Conca.

item.title: The elite route at Eschborn-Frankfurt 2026
item.description: From Eschborn to Frankfurt, through the Taunus, over Sandplacken, Burgweg, Großer Feldberg and Mammolshainer Stich: that is the elite route for the Radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt 2026. Where will you be on the course to cheer on the elite?

item.title: The elite route at Eschborn-Frankfurt 2026

item.title: Watch Eschborn-Frankfurt live on May 1
item.description: Don’t miss a second of the Eschborn-Frankfurt race on May 1 from 11:40 AM, live on hr television, with commentary from Florian Naß and Rick Zabel. The full race will also be available via livestream on hessenschau.de, YouTube, and in the ARD media library. For updates, behind-the-scenes content, and highlights, follow @eschbornfrankfurt on Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.

item.description: All 18 WorldTour teams are now confirmed for the men’s Copenhagen Sprint. Welcome to Netcompany INEOS Cycling Team on the start list, and they are bringing top sprinter Sam Welsford and a strong team to support him. It will be a world-class field.

item.title: Eschborn-Frankfurt on May 1: racing, fan festivals, and family fun along the course
item.description: On May 1, the #Radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt brings top-level racing and a great atmosphere at the many fan festivals in the Taunus, with cheering, celebrating, and dancing along the course. Expect live race coverage, food and drinks, music, DJs, kids’ entertainment, family activities, and great spots to cheer on the riders up close. Bring your friends and experience the race live along the route. Where will you be watching from? Let us know in the comments. #procycling #adacvelotour #eschbornfrankfurt

item.title: Mark Renshaw reflects on life after the peloton
item.description: He holds the record for the most starts in Santos Tour Down Under history, but these days Mark Renshaw is navigating the peloton from the front seat of a team car. Six years after retirement, the former world-leading lead-out specialist reflects on the move from fighting for position at 80 km/h to guiding the next generation of sprinters as a Sports Director for DECATHLON CMA CGM TEAM. Read more about life after the peloton for Mark Renshaw: https://bit.ly/4ubfUJe

item.title: Mark Renshaw reflects on life after the peloton
item.description: He holds the record for the most starts in Santos Tour Down Under history, but these days Mark Renshaw is navigating the peloton from the front seat of a team car. Six years after retirement, the former world-leading lead-out specialist reflects on the move from fighting for position at 80 km/h to guiding the next generation of sprinters as a Sports Director for @decathloncmacgmteam. “It still gets the heart rate up. I’m still very calm in the team car, especially in the final, as you’re still focused, but the heart rate and adrenaline still come up for sure.” “Sprinting hasn’t changed — the fundamentals are all the same and so much of it is about positioning, momentum and timing.” Read more about Mark Renshaw’s life after the peloton at the link in our bio. @santos_ltd #TourDownUnder

item.title: Mark Renshaw reflects on life after the peloton
item.description: He holds the record for the most starts in Santos Tour Down Under history, but these days Mark Renshaw is navigating the peloton from the front seat of a team car. Read more about life after the peloton for Mark Renshaw: bit.ly/4ubfUJe @SantosLtd #TourDownUnder

item.title: Pogačar already at the front
item.description: We were expecting him, and he did not disappoint. @tadejpogacar did not completely dominate the competition — he even admitted he was glad not to be alone on the Ovronnaz climb — but his sprint victory was clear. The @uae_team_emirates leader will wear the yellow jersey from tomorrow, a jersey he says he intends to keep until Sunday evening. 📸 @keystone_sda_sport #TDR #TDRNONSTOP #ROMANDIE #TDR2026 @caffechiccodoro @loterieromande @banque_du_leman @decathlon_ch @lidltrek @primeo_energie

item.title: Tour de Romandie stage 1: Tadej Pogačar wins in Martigny
item.description: Did you miss the first stage of the Tour de Romandie around Martigny, the enthusiastic crowd for Slovenian star Tadej Pogačar, and his impressive ride on the Mayens-de-Chamoson climb? Although the four-time Tour de France winner could not drop all his rivals, he won the four-rider sprint in Martigny and became the fifth world champion to win there. Watch the stage highlights from RTS here: https://lnkd.in/ePn3DkVe And be sure to watch his press-room interview, where it was revealed that the champion’s parents were present on the roadside for this latest success. #TDR #TDRnonstop #Tdrinside #romandie #martigny

item.title: The #Radklassiker2026 is getting ready to start — and it is much more than just a cycling event!
item.description: Supporting young riders means shaping the future. With the Süwag Energie Nachwuchs-Cup, @suewagenergieag will once again support young cycling talents in 2026 and help them move forward on their path. 🌿 Experience the energy transition in the middle of the city The Süwag Energiepark at the Alte Oper invites visitors to experience the energy transition up close — interactive, easy to understand, and for the whole family. 🤝 Strong together for the region Süwag Energie AG shows how regional ties, sports support, and sustainability can go hand in hand. 💡 Curious? @suewagenergieag shares regular updates about the Radklassiker. Follow now so you do not miss anything. Radklassiker2026 #SüwagEnergieAG #Energie.Besser.Machen #Radsport #Nachwuchsförderung #GrüneZukunft #AlteOper

item.title: Our Spring Classics season has officially come to an end, and what a ride it has been
item.description: From the start of Omloop Nieuwsblad in Ghent to the iconic finish of the Ronde van Vlaanderen in Oudenaarde and all the way to the Cauberg in Valkenburg, every moment reminded us why this part of the cycling calendar is so special. We enjoyed it from the first minute to the very last, and we are grateful to everyone who helped make this season unforgettable. Relive some of the biggest highlights in our season recap via the link below. #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: A season to remember 💛 | 2026 Spring Classics Recap
The @adac bicycle insurance is of course not missing the ADAC Velotour
item.description: At the stand on Frankfurt's Opernplatz, the ADAC bicycle insurance has a special highlight for young cycling fans. The main prize is a yellow woom GO 3 AUTOMAGIC children's bike for children aged 4 to 6, and second and third prizes are woom READY children's helmets in sizes XS, S, and M, each with a helmet light. How to enter: 1. Visit the ADAC bicycle insurance stand 2. Have your child's helmet size measured on site 3. Take part in the quiz, fill out the entry card, and keep your fingers crossed. The live draw takes place on May 1, 2026 at 5 p.m. at the stand. Stop by — you and your whole family are welcome! #VelotourFrankfurt #EschbornFrankfurt #ADAC #FahrradLiebe #Gewinnspiel #SicherRadfahren #FrankfurtCity

item.description: The Tour of the Alps brought sport, passion, and energy to the road. The same energy that eVISO giro: app values every day, turning sports activities into energy savings on the electricity bill. We take home the emotions of an event that recharged the batteries of everyone who experienced it, both on and off the course.

Experience the 15th edition of GPCQM from the Signature Space
item.description: Experience the 15th edition of #GPCQM2026 from the Signature Space, the most sought-after spot on the circuit. What awaits you: a clear view of the start and finish, and gourmet offerings all day long. Limited places available, book soon. gpcqm.ca/hospitalite

item.title: Experience the 15th edition of GPCQM from the Signature Space
item.description: Experience the 15th edition of GPCQM from the most sought-after spot on the circuit: the Signature Space. On September 11 in Quebec and September 13 in Montreal, imagine yourself just a few meters from the world's best cyclists, in a unique atmosphere combining sporting intensity and attentive service. What awaits you: a clear view of the start and finish line, gourmet food and refreshments throughout the day, and an electric atmosphere to celebrate this anniversary edition. Places are limited. Reserve your experience: https://gpcqm.ca/hospitalite/ #gpcqm2026

item.title: Experience the 15th edition of the GPCQM from the circuit’s most sought-after spot: the Signature Area
item.description: Experience the 15th edition of the GPCQM from the circuit’s most sought-after spot: the Signature Area. On September 11 in Quebec City and September 13 in Montreal, picture yourself just a few meters from the world’s best cyclists, in a unique atmosphere that combines sporting intensity with attentive service and comfort. What to expect: 📍 An unbeatable view of the start and finish line. 🥂 Gourmet food and refreshments throughout the day. 🔥 An electric atmosphere to celebrate this anniversary edition. Places are limited. Reserve your experience via the link in bio! 🎟️ #gpcqm2026

item.title: The Tour of the Alps is over, but your shopping tour at Brenner Outlet continues all year round
item.description: The Tour of the Alps is over, but your shopping tour at Brenner Outlet continues all year round. Choose your outfit from more than 70 international brands in sport, outdoor fashion, and lifestyle. And don’t miss the new food court with restaurants, a pizzeria, and fast food. Like the #TotA, Brenner Outlet is located on the border between Italy and Austria, at the Brenner Pass! 📷 Sprint Cycling / Matassoni / Brenner Outlet #TouroftheAlps #LiveUphill #BrennerOutlet

item.title: More than a race: ADAC Velotour 2026 in facts and figures
item.description: More than a race: ADAC Velotour 2026 in facts and figures. 📊 12,000 participants – new record! 🎉 43% riding for the first time 👥 87% men / 13% women 💪 Ages 15 to 84 📈 Average age: 40.1 🌍 75 nationalities lined up from all over the world ⏳ Wishing you strong legs and perfect conditions for your final training sessions through the Taunus! We can’t wait to see you at the start line on May 1st! 🙌 #radklassiker #ADACVelotour #EschbornFrankfurt #roadcycling

item.title: Do you love challenges? So do we! Decathlon launches the campaign: Ride kilometers and win a road bike
item.description: Do you love challenges? So do we! 😎 That’s why on April 30 Decathlon is launching the campaign: Ride kilometers and win a road bike! 🚴 The rule is simple: you do what you love, and Decathlon rewards your effort. You can win a top Van Rysel road bike, plus guaranteed vouchers for the fastest riders. Get your bike ready, connect your favorite sports app to your Decathlon account, and wait for the starting signal! 🏁 @Decathlon #decathlon #vanrysel #tourdepologne

item.title: Join the Social Ride during Copenhagen Sprint
item.description: Copenhagen Sprint is not only about the elite race, but also about community. As part of Copenhagen Sprint, we invite you to a Social Ride in Roskilde: a shared cycling experience of about 50 km for cycling enthusiasts. Riders will travel in smaller groups with experienced guides, and a service vehicle, mechanic, and refreshments will be provided along the way. The Social Ride is part of the race weekend and gives participants a chance to experience the atmosphere up close when Copenhagen Sprint gets underway. Early bird: 400 kr. until 8 May. Registration via the link in the comments. Roskilde Municipality.

item.title: Join the Social Ride during Copenhagen Sprint
item.description: Join a social ride of about 50 km with other cycling fans as part of the Copenhagen Sprint weekend in Roskilde. You will ride in smaller groups with experienced guides, and we will take care of the practical details along the way with a service vehicle, mechanic, and refreshments. It is all about great experiences, community, and a love of cycling. After the ride, you can experience the atmosphere up close when Copenhagen Sprint gets underway. Early bird: 400 kr. until 8 May. Sign up here: https://copenhagensprint.com/social-ride/

item.title: Stay protected on the adventure!
item.description: At the Eschborn-Frankfurt cycling classic, sun protection is a must, and we at dm-drogerie markt are there for you. Visit our free sun protection bars at our dm Expo stands and stock up on SUNDANCE products for optimal protection. You can also discover fun activities for the whole family. Come by and get ready for a great day. #dmDeutschland #SUNDANCE #Sonnenschutz #Radklassiker #EschbornFrankfurt #dmFrankfurt

item.title: It was three in a row for @tadejpogacar at Liège-Bastogne-Liège
item.description: It was three in a row for @tadejpogacar at Liège-Bastogne-Liège, and this victory was especially hard fought. As Tadej brought his Classics campaign to a fitting end, we were there to uncover what it takes to win three Monuments in the same season. With the help of our star cameraman, @domen_novak1, our behind-the-scenes video from La Doyenne is not to be missed. #WeAreUAE | #LBL. Click the link in our bio for the full video!

A look back at Ardennes week with La Flèche Wallonne and Liège–Bastogne–Liège
item.description: A look back at an all-Ardennes week with La Flèche Wallonne and Liège–Bastogne–Liège, where the world’s best riders went head-to-head on legendary courses. In Huy, the Mur once again made the difference, producing an explosive showdown in both the men’s and women’s races, with victories for Paul Seixas and Demi Vollering. In Liège, La Doyenne lived up to expectations with panache, strategy, and decisive attacks all the way to the final kilometers, ending with wins for Tadej Pogačar and Demi Vollering. Relive the highlights in pictures. #Bostik #Cycling

item.title: Giveaway: win a Liège–Bastogne–Liège jersey signed by Demi Vollering and Tadej Pogačar
item.description: Giveaway: win a Liège–Bastogne–Liège jersey signed by Demi Vollering and Tadej Pogačar, winners of the 2026 editions. To enter: like this post, follow @classiquesardennes, and tag a friend in the comments. Winner announced on May 11. Good luck to everyone.

item.title: Liège–Bastogne–Liège 2026: photo recap
item.description: Liège–Bastogne–Liège 2026: photo recap. The 112th edition of La Doyenne once again delivered intense moments, combining performance, passion, and a huge public atmosphere. The Province of Liège was proud to support this iconic event at the heart of its territory and sporting identity. Congratulations to all the riders, and thank you to the many fans who came out to make the roads come alive. #liegebastogneliege #cyclisme #provincedeliege #sport #Liège

item.title: Tour of The Alps 2026 recap
item.description: Tour of The Alps 2026 recap. Five unforgettable days of racing, following the riders on the best roads that @euregio_europaregion has to offer. #tourofthealps #euregio #cycling #sportphotography #alps

item.title: Today we ride for something bigger
item.description: Together with the El Sueño de Vicky Foundation, which is dedicated to childhood cancer research, we visited the Hospital Infantil Universitario Niño Jesús to spend time with those who show us every day what true strength means. When a child faces cancer, it takes teamwork and nonstop effort to keep climbing. #LaVueltaesMás #MásSolidaria #ElSueñodeVicky

item.title: Wildcards for the 83rd Tour de Pologne have been awarded
item.description: The wildcards for the 83rd Tour de Pologne have been awarded. Alongside all UCI WorldTour teams, the race will also feature the strongest teams from outside the top tier: Q36.5 Pro Cycling Team, with Tom Pidcock and Kamil Małecki, and Tudor Pro Cycling Team. The team managed by Fabian Cancellara includes Julian Alaphilippe and Marc Hirschi. The Polish national team will also take part. The white-and-reds have once again been given the chance by Lang Team and Czesław Lang to race against the world’s best riders. From August 3 to 9, 2026, the world’s top riders return to Poland, and this year’s edition, under the theme “North–South,” will connect the Baltic Sea with the mountains. The race will be broadcast in up to 65 countries. #ORLEN #WygrywamyRazem

item.title: Brukunga wins 2026 Santos Best Dressed Town Overall Gold
item.description: Congratulations to the town of Brukunga, the 2026 Santos Best Dressed Town Overall Gold winner. Last week, Mount Barker District Council Mayor David Leach joined us to present the awards. Using sustainable, recycled, and handmade elements, from repurposed coffee pot planters to a bike sculpture made from salvaged Cudlee Creek bushfire timber, the town showed great creativity and community spirit. Well done to the Brukunga Community Association Inc. and the Mount Barker District Council. #TourDownUnder

item.title: Tour de Romandie 2026 route summary by Pascal Bärtschi
item.description: Pascal Bärtschi, the technical director of the #TDR, presents the key features of a very mountainous Tour de Romandie 2026. There is no time trial except for the prologue. With four stages run in loops, the race should provide great spectacle. The triple ascent of the Col du Jaun via three different roads will be historic. Full details are in the official program.

item.title: Demi Vollering wins Liège-Bastogne-Liège with a perfectly timed attack
item.description: Liège-Bastogne-Liège always delivers. It was a masterclass in timing, patience, and climbing power. After a tense race that split on the climbs, @demivollering attacked on La Redoute and never looked back. Behind her, the chase stalled as @puckpieterse and @kasianiewiadoma94 fought for the podium. Demi took her third win in Liège.

item.title: Two days until the TDR 2026 prologue in Villars-sur-Glâne
item.description: Two days before the TDR 2026 prologue, a look back to where it all began. Villars-sur-Glâne, Richard Chassot's childhood home, will host the symbolic start of the race. To mark the 20th TDR organized with his teams, this prologue is a return to the roots, linking past and present.

item.title: Tour of the Alps: a week to remember
item.description: Five stages, brutal mountains, and world-class racing. The team gave everything and looks back proudly on an incredible week. Emanuel Zangerle was crowned the Tour’s Breakaway King, while Colin Stüssi made a strong comeback to finish in the top 20 overall. The team also praised the commitment and spirit of every rider, the staff behind the scenes, the partners, and the fans on the roadside. The momentum continues: after the Tour is before the next race.

item.title: Tour of the Alps wrapped up
item.description: An important week of racing is in the books as the team builds toward the Giro.

item.title: Tour of the Alps, Stage 5: Trento to Bolzano
item.description: On the final stage of the Tour of the Alps, Red Bull – BORA – hansgrohe took the overall victory, with Giulio Pellizzari winning the stage. The rider also received a jersey from FC Südtirol and spotted sheep on the way to the finish with the Infront Sports crew.

item.title: Giulio Pellizzari wins final stage and overall at the Tour of the Alps

item.title: A masterplan, perfectly executed
item.description: In the final stage of the Tour of the Alps, TEAM UKYO turned tactics into victory, with Tommaso Dati securing the red points jersey. Smart moves, teamwork, and commitment made the difference all week. Dati won the first intermediate sprint to take the lead in the points classification. Nicolo Garibbo then attacked from the break before the second and final intermediate sprint to take maximum points, limiting Tom Pidcock and putting Dati in control of the classification. When rivals dropped on the final climb, the plan worked perfectly. #TourOfTheAlps #TotA #TEAMUKYO

item.title: Tour of the Alps, Stage 5 and overall: Giulio Pellizzari wins
item.description: Giulio Pellizzari won the final stage of the Tour of the Alps and also claimed the overall victory, the first of his professional career. He finished 1:33 ahead of Egan Bernal, the largest gap between the top two in the race’s history. Since 2013, when Vincenzo Nibali won, no Italian had taken the overall title. Egan Bernal also earned a strong result, returning to the podium of a stage race after third place at the Volta Ciclista a Catalunya in 2023. Both Pellizzari and Bernal will line up at the Giro d’Italia, where they will continue their battle for the maglia rosa and a place on the final podium in Rome. Stage summary: a large breakaway formed early, including stage winners Lennart Jasch and Tom Pidcock, but was gradually caught. INEOS Grenadiers reduced the peloton before Giulio Pellizzari attacked 20 km from the finish and rode solo to victory, securing the overall title ahead of Egan Bernal and Thymen Arensman. Stage 5 podium: 1. Giulio Pellizzari (Red Bull - BORA - hansgrohe), 2. Egan Bernal (INEOS Grenadiers), 3. Michael Storer (Tudor Pro Cycling Team). Overall podium: 1. Giulio Pellizzari (Red Bull - BORA - hansgrohe), 2. Egan Bernal (INEOS Grenadiers), 3. Thymen Arensman (INEOS Grenadiers).

item.title: One month ago: E3 Saxo Classic
item.description: One month ago: the E3 Saxo Classic. Each year, I am able to contribute to one of Flanders' most beautiful cycling classics, from the briefing video for all WorldTour and junior teams to the aftermovie of the day itself. This year, once again, I was a guest at @ranson_nv, who opened their doors for the E3 organization. Thank you for the trust, a pleasure every year.

item.title: Tour of the Alps 2026 Stage 5: Trento - Bozen/Bolzano
item.description: April 24. Stage 5: Trento - Bozen/Bolzano, 128.6 km with 2,850 m of elevation gain. Difficulty: 3 stars. KOMs: Kalterer Höhe / Caldaro Alta (2nd category, km 54) and Nobls/Montoppio (1st category, km 93). Intermediate sprints: Palù di Giovo (km 11) and St. Pauls/San Paolo (km 63). Bonus sprint: Oberglaning/Cologna di Sopra (km 110). Start: 12:00. #TotA #TouroftheAlps #LiveUphill

item.title: Tour de Suisse 2026: Route of the women’s and men’s races
item.description: The Tour de Suisse 2026 features a clear route profile: explosive, selective, and without classic transition stages. The 89th edition of the national tour leaves little room for tactical stalemates and promises excitement from the first to the final kilometre. Day 1: Explosive start in Italy (Sondrio – Sondrio).

item.title: Tour de Suisse 2026: explosive stages and no transition days
item.description: The Tour de Suisse 2026 comes without transition stages: explosive stages, selective climbs, and excitement from start to finish. The 89th edition promises pure cycling. More on our website. #TourDeSuisse #TdS2026 #Cycling #Radsport #ProCycling

item.title: Flèche Wallonne: a race decided on the final climb
item.description: The Flèche Wallonne is a one-day cycling race that may look simple, but its challenge lies in the finale: a short, steep climb that forces riders to wait for the perfect moment. It is a test of pacing, discipline, and timing rather than pure strength. As the Official Technology Partner of the Flèche Wallonne (men's and women's) and 12 other races, Capgemini is helping shape the future of the sport. Cycle through the carousel to see what defines this race.

item.title: Czesław Lang sector on the route of stage 1
item.description: The Czesław Lang sector is on the route of stage 1. This year’s 83rd edition of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour is not only about top-level racing, but also a special journey through places close to race director Czesław Lang’s heart. On stage 1 from Gdynia to Koszalin, the riders will pass through a special Czesław Lang sector that runs through his home region. The route includes Parchowo, Gołczewo, Jeleńcz, Półczno, Łąkie, Mokrzyn, Mądrzechowo, Bytów - LOTTO intermediate sprint, Dąbie, Gostkowo, Kartkowo, Unichowo, Budowo, Motarzyno, Gałąźnia Wielka, Gałąźnia Mała, Świelubie, Górki, Wierszyno, Radusz, Barnowo, Kołczygłowy - Czesław Lang special sprint, Jezierze, and Suchorze. It is a scenic, rolling, and twisting section full of emotion, memories, and racing - a true tribute to a legend of Polish cycling. The main sponsor of the race is ORLEN. The strategic partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour is LOTTO.

It is a scenic, rolling, and twisting section full of emotion, memories, and racing - a true tribute to a legend of Polish cycling. The main sponsor of the race is @grupaorlen. The strategic partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour is @lotto.pl @totalizator_sportowy.

item.title: I etap 83.Tour de Pologne z sektorem Czesława Langa // Stage 1 with the Czesław Lang Sector
⛰️💥Über 3.300 Höhenmeter: Beim #radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt wartet die härteste Strecke der letzten Jahre auf die E...
item.description: ⛰️💥Über 3.300 Höhenmeter: Beim #radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt wartet die härteste Strecke der letzten Jahre auf die Elite! 🚴 Ein Kurs, der vom Start bis ins Finale alles abverlangt! 💪🔥 Neu dabei: der Burgweg – kurz, extrem steil und explosiv! ⚡ ⛰️Sandplacken (1x) – 8 km Länge | ⌀ Steigung 4,6 % ⚡NEU: Burgweg (3x) – 0,5 km Länge | ⌀ Steigung 11 % ⛰️Großer Feldberg (1.) – 3,5 km Länge | ⌀ Steigung 7,7 % 🔥Mammolshain (3x) – 2,3 km Länge | ⌀ Steigung 8,3 % ⛰️Großer Feldberg (2.) – 7,6 km Länge | ⌀ Steigung 6,5 % Der Feldberg wird zweimal in unterschiedlichen Distanzen über die Südwestseite bezwungen – danach rückt die Mammolshainer Passage ins Finale, wo die Entscheidung fallen könnte! 👀 👉 Welcher Streckenabschnitt wird deiner Meinung nach das Rennen entscheiden? 🚴 --- ⛰️💥Over 3,300 meters of elevation gain: at the #radklassiker Eschborn-Frankfurt, the elite face one of the toughest courses in recent years! 🚴 A course that demands everything from start to finish 💪🔥 New this year: Burgweg – short, brutally steep, and explosive! ⚡ ⛰️Sandplacken (1x) – 8 km | ⌀ gradient 4.6% ⚡NEW: Burgweg (3x) – 0.5 km | ⌀ gradient 11% ⛰️Großer Feldberg (1st) – 3.5 km | ⌀ gradient 7.7% 🔥Mammolshain (3x) – 2.3 km | ⌀ gradient 8.3% ⛰️Großer Feldberg (2nd) – 7.6 km | ⌀ gradient 6.5% Feldberg is conquered twice via the southwest side in different distances – before the Mammolshain passage sets up a potential race-deciding finale! 👀 👉 Which section do you think will decide the race? 🚴 #radklassiker #eschbornfrankfurt #procycling #readytorace

item.title: MAILLOTS DE LEADER ET PRIX DISTINCTIFS DU TDR 2026 🥇🏆 Qui voyez-vous remporter le maillot jaune du classement général du Tour de R...
item.description: MAILLOTS DE LEADER ET PRIX DISTINCTIFS DU TDR 2026 🥇🏆 Qui voyez-vous remporter le maillot jaune du classement général du Tour de Romandie ? 🚴♂️ Les vainqueurs d’étapes et du prologue seront récompensés par le nouveau sponsor international de la Boucle romande, Lidl Suisse. Côté maillots distinctifs : 🟠 Maillot orange JouezSport! – Loterie Romande ⚪ Maillot blanc du meilleur jeune – Banque du Léman 🔵⚪ Maillot à pois bleus du meilleur grimpeur – Primeo 👉 Que pensez-vous de ce nouveau design ? ⚠️ Un concours sur la progression des coureurs est lancé ce mardi: faites jouer votre flair cycliste! 🇨🇭 Le meilleur Suisse du jour reçoit le prix de la RTS ☕ Le coureur le plus combatif de l’étape (premier à passer les 25 km de l’arrivée) se voit attribuer le prix Chicco d’Oro Vos pronostics ? 👇 #TDR #TDRnonstop #TDRinside #romandie Lidl Suisse #freshfoodpartner #forhungrymoments Banque du Léman Primeo Energie Loterie Romande #JouezSport ! RTS - Radio Télévision Suisse CHICCO D'ORO TISSOT Europcar Camion Transport SA Orange Cyberdefense Club Maillot Jaune

item.title: Stage 2 #TotA 2026 - Uphill finish means SHOWTIME!
Los highlights de la Itzulia 2026 🔥 | #Itzulia2026
J - 7: LEVER DE RIDEAU #TDR2026 Tous les tracés et les profils de ce Tour De Romandie 2026, long de 851,3 km pour 14'266 m de déni...
item.description: J - 7: LEVER DE RIDEAU #TDR2026 Tous les tracés et les profils de ce Tour De Romandie 2026, long de 851,3 km pour 14'266 m de dénivelé, ont été présenté ce matin. Un parterre fourni de près de 100 personnes, dont de nombreux représentants des médias, dont SRF - Schweizer Radio und Fernsehen pour la Suisse alémanique. Ce tracé montagneux record (en l'absence d'un CLM hormis le prologue) est promis à un coureur très costaud ! ⁉️ Qui voyez-vous remporter le maillot jaune du classement général du Tour de Romandie ? 🚴♂️ Les vainqueurs d’étapes et du prologue seront récompensés par le nouveau sponsor international de la Boucle romande, Lidl Suisse . Côté maillots distinctifs : 🟠 Maillot orange JouezSport! – Loterie Romande ⚪ Maillot blanc du meilleur jeune – Banque du Léman 🔵⚪ Maillot à pois bleus du meilleur grimpeur – Primeo Energie 👉 Que pensez-vous de ce nouveau design ? ⚠️ Un concours sur la progression des coureurs est lancé ce mardi: faites jouer votre flair cycliste! 🇨🇭 Le meilleur Suisse du jour reçoit le prix de la RTS - Radio Télévision Suisse ☕ Le coureur le plus combatif de l’étape (premier à passer les 25 km de l’arrivée) se voit attribuer le prix CHICCO D'ORO Vos pronostics ? 👇 #tdrnonstop #tdrinside #TDR #romandie
