item.title: Dziś w Szkole Podstawowej im. Czesława Langa w Kołczygłowach odbyło się wyjątkowe wydarzenie poświęcone prezentacji SEKT...
item.description: Dziś w Szkole Podstawowej im. Czesława Langa w Kołczygłowach odbyło się wyjątkowe wydarzenie poświęcone prezentacji SEKTORA Czesława Langa oraz Premii Specjalnej jego imienia, które znajdą się na trasie pierwszego etapu 83. Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour 🏁 Spotkanie wpisuje się w intensywne przygotowania do tegorocznej edycji Tour de Pologne, a w szczególności do I etapu rywalizacji, który wystartuje w Gdyni i po 240 km zakończy się w Koszalinie, prowadząc przez rodzinne strony Czesława Langa. Specjalny SEKTOR będzie obejmował takie miejscowości jak: Parchowo, Gołczewo, Jeleńcz, Półczno, Łąkie, Mokrzyn, Mądrzechowo, Bytów (Premia Lotna LOTTO), Dąbie, Gostkowo, Kartkowo, Unichowo, Budowo, Motarzyno, Gałąźnia Wielka, Gałąźnia Mała, Świelubie, Górki, Wierszyno, Radusz, Barnowo, Kołczygłowy (Premia Specjalna im. Czesława Langa), Jezierze i Suchorze 🚴🏻‍♂️ W drugiej części wydarzenia na uczniów czekała wyjątkowa niespodzianka. Odbyło się uroczyste przekazanie nowego logo szkoły, ufundowanego przez Czesława oraz Elżbietę Lang. Podczas ceremonii zaprezentowano symbolikę znaku oraz historię jego powstania, a następnie dokonano oficjalnego odsłonięcia herbu placówki. Więcej przeczytacie na naszej stronie internetowej 👉🏻 https://www.tourdepologne.pl/…/etap-pierwszy-83-tour-de-po…/ LOTTO. Radość wygrywania Totalizator Sportowy #WygrywamyRazem 📸 Andrzej Gucwa

Ou de vibrer dans les villages départ/arrivée ? 🔁 Profitez des étapes en boucles pour multiplier les émotions ! 📘 Pour tout savoir : le guide du spectateur est dispo 👇 https://lnkd.in/eFXjyEhH #tdrnonstop #tdrinside #romandie #TDR

item.title: Paula Blasi surprises everyone! 🇪🇸 | Highlights Amstel Gold Race 2026
A surprise win to and a strong return at last weekend's Amstel Gold Race. On the women’s side, we witnessed a stunning breakthroug...
item.description: A surprise win to and a strong return at last weekend's Amstel Gold Race. On the women’s side, we witnessed a stunning breakthrough. Paula Blasi shocked the peloton with the biggest win of her career. After being dropped on the Bemelerberg alongside Marianne Vos, she fought her way back when the pace dropped, launched an immediate attack and never looked behind. While Blasi powered clear, the chase lacked organisation. Katarzyna Niewiadoma and Demi Vollering were isolated in the finale and completed the podium after a batte on the Cauberg. On the men’s side, it was all about redemption. Remco Evenepoel and Mattias Skjelmose met again in an epic battle over the Dutch hills. Evenepoel sprinted to victory and claimed his first Dutch classic in a dominant fashion. This year's Amstel Gold Race elite race was the last edition with race director Leo van Vliet. After 30 years, van Vliet will be succeeded by Tom Dumoulin. Thank you for everything, Leo! And of course, thank you to all our partners who made this a brilliant race. Amstel Bier , Shimano Benelux B.V. , Lazer, Boels Rental , Immoweb , Staatsloterij , Wealer , Lidl Nederland , PostNL , Pauwels Sauces , Tudor Watch & Dolmans Landscaping Group bv .

item.title: Soudal Oficjalnym Partnerem 83. Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour! 🙌🏻 Soudal to światowy lider w produkcji pianek poliuret...
item.description: Soudal Oficjalnym Partnerem 83. Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour! 🙌🏻 Soudal to światowy lider w produkcji pianek poliuretanowych oraz wiodący dostawca mas uszczelniających, klejów i chemii budowlanej. W ubiegłym roku po etapowy triumf w Cieszynie sięgnął Paul Magnier, zawodnik drużyny sponsorowanej przez Soudal. W Polsce ekipa występowała w specjalnie przygotowanych strojach T-Rex Quick-Step, promując jeden ze swoich flagowych produktów. 📺Kontynuacja współpracy z marką Soudal pokazuje wartość, jaką niesie za sobą Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour. Wyścig posiada renomę jednego z najważniejszych w kalendarzu Międzynarodowej Unii Kolarskiej, a dzięki transmisji na antenach Telewizji Polskiej, Eurosportu i platformy streamingowej HBO Max dociera do milionów kibiców w Polsce i na całym świecie. Czytaj wieciej TUTAJ 👉🏻 https://www.tourdepologne.pl/…/soudal-oficjalnym-partnerem…/ Soudal Polska Soudal #soudal #tourdepologne ________ 🇺🇸 Soudal Becomes an Official Partner of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour Soudal, a global leader in polyurethane foam production and a leading supplier of sealants, adhesives, and construction chemicals, has once again become an Official Partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour—one of the most prestigious cycling races in this part of Europe. Last year, a stage victory in Cieszyn was claimed by Paul Magnier, representing a team sponsored by Soudal. During the race in Poland, the team competed in specially designed T-Rex Quick-Step kits, promoting one of the brand’s flagship products. The continuation of this partnership highlights the value and international reach of the Tour de Pologne. The race is widely recognized as one of the key events on the Union Cycliste Internationale calendar and, thanks to broadcasts on Telewizja Polska, Eurosport, and the streaming platform HBO Max, reaches millions of fans in Poland and around the world. Read more HERE 👉🏻 https://www.tourdepologne.pl/…/soudal-named-official-partn…/

item.title: Polki ponownie wystartują w Tour de Pologne Women! Tegoroczna, 4. edycja wyścigu (24-26 lipca) zyskała rangę UCI ProSeries, co oznacza jeszcze wyższy poziom rywalizacji i obecność ekip World Touru. Wśród nich na starcie zobaczymy Reprezentację Polski Polski Związek Kolarski oraz MAT ATOM Deweloper Wrocław. To świetna okazja dla naszych zawodniczek, by sprawdzić się na tle światowej czołówki - w ubiegłym roku Kaja Rysz i Malwina Mul finiszowały w TOP 10 klasyfikacji generalnej. Wyścig odbędzie się w województwie lubelskim i będzie transmitowany . w TVP, Eurosporcie i HBO Max - do obejrzenia aż w 65 krajach! @GrupaORLEN @totalizator_sp #ORLEN #TdPWomen #LOTTO #TotalizatorSportowy #W

item.title: Name a better way to end our Spring Classics than De Brabantse Pijl! On the women’s side, strength did not guarantee victory. Anna...
item.description: Name a better way to end our Spring Classics than De Brabantse Pijl! On the women’s side, strength did not guarantee victory. Anna van der Breggen looked like the strongest rider in the race, but it was Célia Gery who seized her opportunity. After already impressing in a supporting role this spring, she was given her chance in an unexpected sprint and delivered with confidence. The young French rider surged to her first professional road victory in style. On the men’s side, a strong elite group featuring Romain Grégoire and former winner Benoît Cosnefroy built a promising advantage after the final climbs, but just when it seemed the attackers would hold on all the way to Overijse, everything came back together in the final S-Bocht. Anders Foldager judged his effort perfectly and launched at exactly the right moment. He powered to the biggest win of his career, holding off Quinten Hermans and Cosnefroy in a thrilling sprint. Congratulations to all riders for an unforgettable day of racing, and a huge thank you to all partners, volunteers and supporters who made it possible. KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), MyWhoosh , Lokaal bestuur Lennik , Lokaal Bestuur Beersel , Gemeente en OCMW Overijse , Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #FLCS #DBP26 #SetThePace

item.description: ⏳ J-10 avant le prologue du #TDR ⏳ Le compte à rebours est lancé: mardi 21 avril, présentation de cette édition 2026 devant partenaires et médias. 👀Un nom attire déjà tous les regards : Tadej Pogačar. Avant de poser ses roues en Romandie, le Slovène disputera encore Liège-Bastogne-Liège. Dernier stop avant d’enchaîner directement avec son premier Tour de Romandie . Dans quelle forme arrivera le deux fois 2e de @Paris-Roubaix? Ce qui est sûr, c'est que quand "Pogi" est au départ, il y a une dimension en plus ! item.title: 'It’s not the results, it’s the people.' From the inaugural GreenEDGE roster in 2012 to becoming the heartbeat of the Australian peloton, Luke Durbridge has seen it all. But after 20 years of chasing dreams across Europe, he's finally ready to head home. Durbo opens up about his decision to retire, the reality of midnight flights and why there’s no place like the Santos Tour Down Under. Read now:
item.description: 'It’s not the results, it’s the people.' From the inaugural GreenEDGE roster in 2012 to becoming the heartbeat of the Australian peloton, Luke Durbridge has seen it all. But after 20 years of chasing dreams across Europe, he's finally ready to head home. Durbo opens up about his decision to retire, the reality of midnight flights and why there’s no place like the Santos Tour Down Under. item.title: Another dominant sprint display at the Ronde van Limburg. After his victory in the Scheldeprijs, Tim Merlier proves he’s fully bac...
item.description: Another dominant sprint display at the Ronde van Limburg. After his victory in the Scheldeprijs, Tim Merlier proves he’s fully back on track with a powerful win in the Ronde van Limburg. On the demanding finishing stretch in Tongeren-Borgloon, Merlier was simply untouchable. He launched his sprint with authority, immediately putting several bike lengths between himself and the rest of the field, leaving no doubt about who the fastest man was. Fernando Gaviria sprinted to second place, while Floris Van Tricht impressed with a strong third as best of the rest. Safe to say: Tim Merlier is back. Thanks to Immoweb , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Alken-Maes , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Ethias , PostNL , Pauwels Sauces , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), Sport Vlaanderen , Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ), Stad Hasselt , Stad Tongeren-Borgloon & Stad Bilzen-Hoeselt . #RVL26 #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: ⌛ J- 14 POUR L'ÉTAPE RUE - VUCHERENS ! 🚵🏻♀️ « Par monts et par vaux » : l'expression remonte au XVᵉ siècle et colle à cette étape de...
item.description: ⌛ J- 14 POUR L'ÉTAPE RUE - VUCHERENS ! 🚵🏻♀️ « Par monts et par vaux » : l'expression remonte au XVᵉ siècle et colle à cette étape des petites, mais chouettes (noms des habitants de celle d'arrivée!) communes. 📅 Jeudi 30 avril, de Rue ( Etat de Fribourg - Staat Freiburg ), à Vucherens ( Etat de Vaud ), collines, traversées de villages, changements de rythme et paysages typiques seront le décor d'une belle bataille. De Rue, autoproclamée plus petite ville d’Europe, à Vucherens, autre hameau de 500 âmes, la 3e étape voit grand ! Elle célèbre la fusion de 7 communes, toutes touchées par le tracé de Pascal Bärtschi . « Avec trois boucles de 50 km dans la Jorat, repassant trois fois la ligne d’arrivée et la bosse de Vuillens (GPM 3e cat) à 3 km de la ligne, d'où on voit les 2 derniers kilomètres! 💪🏻 Même petits, on peut voir grand et dérouler le tapis rouge aux géants du peloton. Et quel géants, avec Tadej Pogačar, Primož Roglič, Florian Lipowitz, Lenny Martinez, etc. 🏆 Votre favori pour cette étape ? Et pour le maillot jaune final de ce #TDR ? ℹ️ https://lnkd.in/ekpiQwne #TDR2026 #tdrinside #tdrnonstop #romandie #boucleromande Lidl Suisse #forhungrymoments Primeo Energie Banque du Léman Loterie Romande #JouezSport ! RTS - Radio Télévision Suisse CAFFE CHICCO D'ORO GMBH

item.title: Last week, we brought the very first FLCS Clubhouse presented by MyWhoosh to life in the iconic Wintercircus Ghent. Over the cours...
item.description: Last week, we brought the very first FLCS Clubhouse presented by MyWhoosh to life in the iconic Wintercircus Ghent . Over the course of five days, the venue transformed into an open sport hub where athletes, communities, and brands came together to explore what sport looks like today, and where it’s heading. Built around the theme “Beyond the Club”, the Clubhouse reflected a shift towards more flexible, digital and community-driven ways of engaging with sport. From insightful talks to high-energy activations, the focus was clear: creating connections that go beyond traditional structures, both on and offline. The week was defined by movement and interaction. Social rides and runs brought communities together across the city, including the Salomon runs that energized the streets of Ghent and connected runners of all levels. On the cycling side, standout moments like the Sportful ride featuring Peter Sagan, Paolo Bettini and Daniel Oss showcased the unique power of riding together. Inside the Clubhouse, Rite.Studios hosted a series of immersive sessions, combining performance and recovery to elevate the overall experience. Alongside these activations, the space continuously evolved into a meeting point for ideas, collaboration and storytelling where sport, lifestyle and innovation seamlessly merged. Moments like the Lidl België & Luxemburg Fresh Table dinner further highlighted the power of bringing people together, both on and off the bike. With the FLCS Clubhouse, Flanders Classics takes a clear step forward: from event organiser to a platform that connects communities, partners and athletes in a hybrid, ever-evolving sports ecosystem. A big thank you to our partners: MyWhoosh, 100% , Salomon, Sportful, Neversecond Benelux , La Marzocco , Red Bull , WOWOW Reflective Wear and Lidl And to the communities who helped shape this experience: Ghent Running Crew , RPM™ Souplesse , Octane Racing and Rite Studios This was just the beginning. #SetThePace #FLCS

item.title: 🗺️ Her er 2026-ruten! 👀 Start i Roskilde på Stændertorvet, rundt i Nordsjælland og så afsluttende omgange i København....
item.description: 🗺️ Her er 2026-ruten! 👀 Start i Roskilde på Stændertorvet, rundt i Nordsjælland og så afsluttende omgange i København. Kvinderne kører 3 omgange og mændene kører 5 omgange på rundstrækningen i København. I år kommer rytterne ind via Vigerslev Allé og rammer rundstrækningen i København på Rådhuspladsen ved Faxe-kondi svinget – så festen her bliver endnu større 🍾 🌉 Igen i år slår mændenes rute en sjølfe og kører over Kronprinsesse Marys Bro i Frederikssund. Swipe for at se, hvordan det så ud sidste år. Vi glæder os helt vildt til igen at se verdens bedste ryttere køre gennem Sjælland. Sæt stort kryds i kalenderen 13. – 14. juni, når World Touren kommer til Danmark 🇩🇰🚴🏻‍♂️🚴‍♀️ Psssst: Vi kommer med flere ret spændende nyheder i dag – så husk at følg os! Roskilde Kommune Københavns Kommune Frederikssund Kommune Fredensborg Kommune Egedal Kommune Hillerød Kommune Furesø Kommune Ballerup Kommune Rødovre Kommune Hvidovre Kommune Brøndby Kommune Allerød Kommune Sport Event Denmark VisitCopenhagen Danmarks Cykle Union

item.title: 🚴♂️ BROC – CHARMEY : QUE DE DÉFIS ! L'étape du samedi 2 mai porte clairement la patte des Bärtschi. Bernard, le papa, rêvait de ce...
item.description: 🚴♂️ BROC – CHARMEY : QUE DE DÉFIS ! L'étape du samedi 2 mai porte clairement la patte des Bärtschi. Bernard, le papa, rêvait de ce parcours depuis le village chocolatier. Avant de trouver la solution, il a transmis la casquette de directeur technique à son fils Pascal. 🗻Et c’est finalement une petite route repérée pendant des vacances qui a permis au nouveau maestro des tracés d’imaginer cette étape reine : trois passages au Jaun, par trois routes différentes ! Avec un final redoutable : 700 m de dénivelé entre 8 et 12 %. 💥 💪 Un terrain parfait pour un puncheur-grimpeur qui voudrait signer un grand numéro. En forme d'estocade. Façon… Tadej Pogacar ! Côté suisse, les regards suivront de près le Jurassien Yannis Voisard. 🇨🇭 ⛔ Le défi sera aussi logistique, avec de nombreuses routes et accès fernés dans toute la région. Mais le spectacle promet d’être... à la hauteur! 📣 Avis aux spectateurs : prévoyez d’accéder à Charmey tôt le matin ! Les trois dernières arrivées dans la vallée de la Jogne : • 2002 : Dario Frigo s’impose à Charmey et pose les bases de sa victoire finale, devant Alex Zülle. • 2007 : l’Italien Matteo Bono règle une échappée de trois coureurs. Thomas Dekker remporte le général devant Paolo Salvoldelli. • 2012 : Luis León Sánchez gagne l’étape d’un Tour de Romandie remporté par Bradley Wiggins ❓ Et cette année, qui voyez-vous gagner l'étape? 📷 Charmey / Broc - Upperview Productions Sàrl #BrocCharmey #TourDeRomandie #Cyclisme #Charmey #EtapeReine #tdrnonstop #romandieforever #gruyère #chocolat Etat de Fribourg - Staat Freiburg

item.title: Przedstawiamy Wam oficjalną grafikę 83. Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour! Już 3 sierpnia 2026 oczy całego kolarskiego świata zwrócą się na Polskę. Wyjątkowa edycja wystartuje w Gdyni, która w tym roku świętuje swoje 100-lecie - to właśnie stąd rozpocznie się wielka, sportowa podróż przez cały kraj. Tegoroczna trasa poprowadzi peleton z Północy na Południe - od nadmorskich krajobrazów Bałtyku aż po wymagające, górskie etapy na południu Polski. item.title: Chaos on the cobbles. Dust, crashes, split seconds. Across both the men’s and women’s races, @rideshimano Neutral Servic...
item.description: Chaos on the cobbles. Dust, crashes, split seconds. Across both the men’s and women’s races, @rideshimano Neutral Service was right in the middle of it. 12 wheel swaps in a blink. 1 bike change under pressure. 2 chain drops fixed in seconds. 6 riders back on their bikes after crashes. 4 bidons handed out along the way. Always there, wherever the race goes. Paris-Roubaix at its toughest. #RideShimano #DURAACE

item.title: ✨ Connaissez-vous le Club Maillot Jaune ? 😎 Rejoindre ce cercle, ce n’est pas seulement vivre une expérience VIP sur le Tour de Ro...
item.description: ✨ Connaissez-vous le Club Maillot Jaune ? 😎 Rejoindre ce cercle, ce n’est pas seulement vivre une expérience VIP sur le Tour de Romandie : ➡️ c’est intégrer un cercle privilégié de partenaires et accéder à un véritable réseau d’influence autour de la Boucle romande. 🚴♂️ Une immersion unique dans la course — suivre un coureur lors du prologue, ou vivre des moments rares, comme croiser Tadej Pogacar en amont du peloton (📷 #TDRF2025 ). 🍽️ Une expérience gastronomique d’exception avec l’étape gourmande du 19 juin au Fairmont Le Montreux Palace . L’adhésion ouvre la porte à : • des rencontres à forte valeur ajoutée • des opportunités de développement et de synergies • des événements exclusifs tout au long de l’année 🤝 Pensé par Laurent CLAUDE pour les décideurs, entrepreneurs et passionnés, ce club propose un équilibre rare entre expérience sportive, gastronomie et networking stratégique. 💛 C’est aussi une manière concrète de soutenir le Tour de Romandie et de contribuer au rayonnement du cyclisme et du territoire romand. 💰 Adhésion annuelle : CHF 1’000.– ⚠️ Places limitées Intéressé(e) par ce cercle exclusif ? Prenons contact. ⏳ Il est encore temps avant ce #TDR2026 🎯 https://lnkd.in/guX_Eh7N #TDR #TDRnonstop #Romandie #Paysromand #networking #réseautage #patrimoinesportif #VIP #clubmaillotjaune Richard Chassot Chassot Concept SA

item.description: À 4 kilomètres de l’arrivée, la stratégie dans la voiture était claire : “On risque tout pour le podium”. @stefanbissegger aura tenté, mais le velodrome a eu le dernier mot. Il termine avec une très belle 8ème place 👊 // With 4 kilometers to go, the strategy in the car was clear: “We risk everything for the podium”. Stefan Bissegger gave it his all, but the velodrome had the final say. He finishes with a very strong 8th place 👊 #DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM - À 4 kilomètres de l’arrivée, la stratégie dans la voiture était claire : “On risque tout pour le podium”. @stefanbissegger aura tenté, mais le velodrome a eu le dernier mot. item.title: 🔥 Victoire de Franziska Koch sur la 6ᵉ édition de @parisroubaix_femmes ! 🏁 Après 143 km de course et 33,7 km de pavés,...
item.description: 🔥 Victoire de Franziska Koch sur la 6ᵉ édition de @parisroubaix_femmes ! 🏁 Après 143 km de course et 33,7 km de pavés, elle s’impose dans un final haletant face à Marianne Vos. 🚴‍♀️ Une course-poursuite intense, avec Pauline Ferrand-Prévot toujours au contact ! 📍 Arrivée mythique au Vélodrome André-Pétrieux qui a encore vibré: 🏆 Podium : 🥇 Franziska Koch 🥈 Marianne Vos 🥉 Pauline Ferrand-Prévot 🇩🇪 Glückwunsch Franziska ! #hdf #parisroubaix #parisroubaixfemmes #sport

item.title: Hell was loud today 😈 On the cobbles of @parisroubaixcourse 🇫🇷, there are no easy moments—only grit, chaos, and the r...
item.description: Hell was loud today 😈 On the cobbles of @parisroubaixcourse 🇫🇷, there are no easy moments—only grit, chaos, and the relentless will to keep pushing. We fought for every meter of the Hell of the North. A hard-earned second place on the podium, on the toughest roads in cycling. And we never back down. #WeAreUAE #ParisRoubaix

item.title: Les habitants de L’Enfer nous ont donné la fièvre. Merci à tous les supporters présents pour cette ambiance unique. Nous...
item.description: Les habitants de L’Enfer nous ont donné la fièvre. Merci à tous les supporters présents pour cette ambiance unique. Nous, on a déjà hâte de revenir l’année prochaine… et vous ? 👀 The locals of Hell gave us the fever. A massive thank you to all the fans out there for this unique atmosphere. We can’t wait for next year already... what about you? 👀 #DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM - @paulineballet

item.title: there is nothing better than a cold shower after a hard day working. bad luck at Ahrenberg with a puncture.. there I los...
item.description: there is nothing better than a cold shower after a hard day working. bad luck at Ahrenberg with a puncture.. there I lost connection to the front group. at the end a solid 31 place at my 13th @parisroubaixcourse. and my fastest race as well. after shower the @tc_parisroubaixjuniors organized a surprise party at the @amisdeparisroubaix museum for my family, my friends, for me. thank you so much for this one… it‘s always great to be here. chez mes amis. a roubaix. hugs #dege #dgnklb 📷 @mr.pinko

item.title: 🗣️ Wout van Aert: “It means everything to me. It’s been a goal since 2018, when I first came here and lost my teammate...
item.description: 🗣️ Wout van Aert: “It means everything to me. It’s been a goal since 2018, when I first came here and lost my teammate Michael Goolaerts. Ever since then, my goal has been to come back here and point to the sky.” ☝️ 🗣️ Wout van Aert : « Ça représente tout pour moi. C’est un objectif depuis 2018, quand je suis venu ici pour la première fois et que j’ai perdu mon coéquipier Michael Goolaerts. Depuis, mon objectif est de revenir ici et de levr le doigt vers le ciel. » 🫂 #ParisRoubaix

item.title: POGAČAR ET AUTRES CRACKS DEVRAIENT AIMER L'ÉTAPE DE MARTIGNY ! 💛 🏔️Décor alpin grandiose, tracé en boucles, avec dans le dernier to...
item.description: POGAČAR ET AUTRES CRACKS DEVRAIENT AIMER L'ÉTAPE DE MARTIGNY ! 💛 🏔️Décor alpin grandiose, tracé en boucles, avec dans le dernier tour, la montée des Mayens de Chamoson, propice aux grands numéros (suivez notre regard 😉). Et puis, pour l'HISTOIRE ! 💥 Le phénoménal Slovène - qu'il gagne ou non Paris-Roubaix ce dimanche - aime poser des jalons, et graver son nom dans les palmarès. Et comme celui des 12 précédentes arrivées du #TDR à Martigny est phénoménal… : 🏆Les plus grands y ont brillé. Par exemple, lors de la victoire finale de Koblet sur le TDR 1953, les 2ème places de Bahamontes ou Coppi, etc. Mais surtout, "Pogi" peut écrire une nouvelle page de la belle histoire arc-en-ciel à Martigny: 🌈🌈🌈🌈Quatre champions du monde s'y sont imposés, comme Mario Cipollini en 1996 et Peter Sagan en 2021, après Darrigade et Bobet. Pogačar serait le 5ème. Et il se mettrait du coup sur orbite pour ajouter le TDR à son tableau de chasse. Pour toute savoir de Martigny et du Tour de Romandie, savourez donc le site du VC Excelsior Martigny, fier organisateur de l'étape du 29 avril: ➡️ urlr.me/ks2Nvw Vélo-Club Excelsior : https://lnkd.in/esd9DfbF 📸 Thomas Masotti #tdrnonstop #tdrinside #martigny #romandie #valais Lidl Suisse #forhungrymoments #freshfoodpartner Loterie Romande #JouezSport ! Primeo Energie Banque du Léman RTS - Radio Télévision Suisse Caffè Chicco dOro TISSOT

item.title: ⏳ J - 21 pour l'étape Orbe - Orbe ! ⌛ J -18 pour prologue à Villars-sur-Glâne. Une fantastique journée attend à la fois les coureu...
item.description: ⏳ J - 21 pour l'étape Orbe - Orbe ! ⌛ J -18 pour prologue à Villars-sur-Glâne. Une fantastique journée attend à la fois les coureurs... ... et le public! Explications : 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴 🚴🏻♂️🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴🏻 🚴🏻♂️🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴🏻 🚴🏻♂️ Après le départ, le peloton repassera trois fois sur la ligne d'arrivée pendant l'étape! 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴 🚴🏻♂️🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴🏻 🚴🏻♂️🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♀️ 🚴🏻♂️ 🚴🏻 🚴🏻♂️ De quoi garantir une ambiance en continu sur le site, jusqu'à l'arrivée... au sprint? C'est le meilleur jour pour réussir un coup pour les équipes de sprinters: show devant ! 🎁 Et on vous le glisse en douce : une surprise dans le ciel d'orbe o, au moment du départ, devrait donner des ailes aux sprinters et à tout le peloton. Une idée ? ⁉️ Mini-quizz: quel coureur, malade, a manqué sa 3ème victoire sur le Tour de Romandie lors d'un contre-la-montre à Orbe en 1996 (victoire finale d'Abraham Olano)? Pour tout savoir sur la cité urbigène : https://lnkd.in/exR-q7ye #TDR2026 #tdrinside #tdrnonstop #romandie #romandieforever #boucleromande Avec: Lidl Suisse Primeo Energie Banque du Léman #JouezSport ! A very sunny edition of the Scheldeprijs 2026, perfect weather for the 100th edition in Schoten! In the women’s race there was an...
item.description: A very sunny edition of the Scheldeprijs 2026, perfect weather for the 100th edition in Schoten! In the women’s race there was an early breakaway of seven riders, caught well before the finish, the peloton remained firmly in control heading into the local laps. Charlotte Kool confirmed her status as top favourite with an impressive and composed performance. After several close calls in previous editions, she finally claimed her long-awaited victory in Schoten. In the men’s race, Tim Merlier delivered a powerful statement. A key moment unfolded when Jordi Meeus opened his sprint early, leaving Jasper Philipsen briefly boxed in. Merlier seized the opportunity on the outside and surged past the entire field, proving once again why he is among the fastest men in the world. Another race done and dusted, see you next week in Limburg. KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), MyWhoosh , Gemeente Terneuzen , Gemeente Schoten , Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #SetThePace #SP26 #FLCS

item.title: It has been a decade since @mathew.hayman hoisted the iconic rock at Paris-Roubaix, yet his race-winning bike remains un...
item.description: It has been a decade since @mathew.hayman hoisted the iconic rock at Paris-Roubaix, yet his race-winning bike remains untouched – a silent witness to 255 kilometres of dust and cobbles.⁣⁣ ⁣⁣ Ten years on from that career-defining Sunday, the 12-time Santos Tour Down Under starter reflects on the journey from lifelong domestique and road captain to his ‘holy grail’ win and eventual transition to Sports Director for @greenedgecycling.⁣⁣⁣ ⁣⁣ “The 2016 Paris-Roubaix was the fulfilment of a career, but I would have done the sport all over again even without the win.⁣⁣ ⁣⁣ “You do realise it is the journey and not the result, because as great as it was, it also washed away a lot quicker than 19 years in the sport.”⁣⁣ ⁣⁣ Read more about life after the peloton for Mathew Hayman at the link in our bio.⁣⁣ ⁣ @santos_ltd #TourDownUnder

item.description: Jedziemy dalej 💙 Liczby to nasza specjalność, dlatego dobrze wiemy, że 1️⃣3️⃣ przynosi szczęście ‼️ Zwłaszcza wtedy, gdy wraz z naszą marką LOTTO. Radość wygrywania 13. rok z rzędu jedziemy 🚴 razem z Tour de Pologne jako Partner Strategiczny tego wyjątkowego wydarzenia 🤝 Przed nami 83. edycja jedynego wyścigu rangi UCI WorldTour w Europie Środkowo-Wschodniej 🚴‍♂️ A wraz z nią wielka kumulacja kolarskich emocji 🔥 ➡️ Jak co roku ważną częścią naszego partnerstwa pozostaje lubiana przez kibiców Klasyfikacja Najaktywniejszy Zawodnik LOTTO 💙 bo to właśnie ona od lat podkręca tempo rywalizacji, buduje napięcie i przyciąga uwagę już od pierwszych chwil wyścigu! 🏆 Już nie możemy się doczekać! Będzie #odLOTTOwo! 🟡 #WygrywamyRazem

LOTTO zostaje z nami na dłużej! Marka LOTTO. Radość wygrywania - należąca do Totalizator Sportowy - przez kolejne dwa la...
item.description: LOTTO zostaje z nami na dłużej! Marka LOTTO. Radość wygrywania - należąca do Totalizator Sportowy - przez kolejne dwa lata będzie Partnerem Strategicznym Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour oraz Partnerem Klasyfikacji Najaktywniejszy Zawodnik LOTTO 💙 „Od 13 lat Totalizator Sportowy jest z nami. Niebieska koszulka Najaktywniejszego Zawodnika LOTTO już na stałe wbiła się w świadomość kibiców i co roku walką o nią dostarcza wielu emocji” - podkreśla Czesław Lang. Do zobaczenia na trasie 83. edycji w dniach 3-9 sierpnia! 🚴‍♂️ ------ LOTTO stays with us for longer! The LOTTO brand – owned by Totalizator Sportowy – will remain the Strategic Partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour and the Partner of the LOTTO Most Active Rider Classification for the next two years 💙 “For 13 years, Totalizator Sportowy has been with us. The blue LOTTO Most Active Rider jersey has permanently embedded itself in fans’ awareness, and every year the competition for it brings a lot of excitement,” says Czesław Lang. See you on the route of the 83rd edition from August 3–9! 🚴‍♂️ #TdP #LOTTO

item.title: What an incredible day of cycling during the Ronde van Vlaanderen. Tadej Pogacar confirmed his status as the strongest rider in th...
item.description: What an incredible day of cycling during the Ronde van Vlaanderen. Tadej Pogacar confirmed his status as the strongest rider in the world with a commanding and fearless performance. Animating the race from the first passage on the Oude Kwaremont, he dictated the pace before launching his decisive move on the final ascent. Both Remco Evenepoel & Mathieu van der Poel fought bravely but had no answer to the Slovenian’s accelerations. Pogacar was untouchable, riding solo all the way to Oudenaarde and securing a third victory, placing himself among the race’s recordholders. In the women’s race, Demi Vollering delivered a masterclass to claim her first victory in the Tour of Flanders. Perfectly supported by her team, she made her move on the Oude Kwaremont with an acceleration no one could match. From there, she extended her lead with authority, sealing an unforgettable win and adding another major title to her already impressive palmares. Thank you to all riders, teams and fans for another unforgettable edition of the Ronde van Vlaanderen. And of course, this wouldn't have been possible without the support of our partners: KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), MyWhoosh , Stad Antwerpen , Stad Oudenaarde , Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #RVV26 #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: All signals green, three times through Schoten with the Manx Express 🚅
FLCS & Proximus present 'Event Reservation' | Secure race communication during the Spring Classics
With the support of partner Proximus, Flanders Classics can rely this spring on 'Event Reservation' to facilitate communication be...
item.description: With the support of partner Proximus, Flanders Classics can rely this spring on 'Event Reservation' to facilitate communication between the peloton and the race control centre. This technology reserves part of the available mobile network capacity for crucial race communication. It marks a new step in the safety measures implemented during Flanders Classics races. Tomas Van Den Spiegel , CEO of Flanders Classics: “Our race control centre is the central hub where all information from the race comes together, including the monitoring by the federal police. But the connection from that epicentre to race management and our safety team along the course is not always easy. Large crowds along the course using the same mobile network can lead to congestion at certain critical points. We are very pleased that, thanks to Proximus, we can now use 'Event Reservation', which gives priority to our mission-critical communication on the mobile network and thus ensures the connection between all actors." Kris van Cauwenbergh, Network Expert Proximus NXT: “We are extremely proud to support Flanders Classics in ensuring safety on and around the course. With ‘Event Reservation’, we secure crucial race communication, even during peak network usage. In a race where every second counts, Proximus ‘Event Reservation’ makes sure that safety never has to wait for connectivity.” The technology has already been successfully used during Omloop het Nieuwsblad, In Flanders Fields – From Middelkerke to Wevelgem, Dwars door Vlaanderen and will also be deployed during the Tour of Flanders, Scheldeprijs, and De Brabantse Pijl. 🤝 Proximus Group #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: Dwars door Vlaanderen delivered once again! The Flemish classic proved to be a race of grit, timing and relentless ambition, a tru...
item.description: Dwars door Vlaanderen delivered once again! The Flemish classic proved to be a race of grit, timing and relentless ambition, a true midweek highlight on the road to the Tour of Flanders. On the men’s side, Wout van Aert came heartbreakingly close to victory after an all-in effort that lit up the race. Launching a powerful solo attack with over 40 kilometers to go, he dismantled the field on climbs like the Eikenberg and bridged to the leaders with authority. One by one, his rivals dropped, leaving van Aert alone against the peloton. However in the final meters, Filippo Ganna surged past, denying van Aert a well-deserved win. In the women’s race, Marlen Reusser marked her return in the most impressive way possible. After months out, she seized victory through strength and race intelligence. Together with Demi Vollering, she forced a decisive move at the front, building a gap that seemed enough to decide the race. Late attacker Lieke Nooijen bridged back in the final straight, creating a moment of hesitation. Thank you to all riders, teams and fans for another unforgettable edition of Dwars door Vlaanderen. KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), MyWhoosh , Stad Roeselare , Stad Waregem , Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #DDV26 #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: 🚴 À J-26, voilà la Newsletter du TDR. La nouvelle infolettre officielle du Tour de Romandie sort ce jeudi. Vous êtes sur le point...
item.description: 🚴 À J-26, voilà la Newsletter du TDR. La nouvelle infolettre officielle du Tour de Romandie sort ce jeudi. Vous êtes sur le point de la recevoir… si vous y êtes abonnés ! Cette édition met en lumière : ▪️ L’arrivée de Lidl Suisse , fresh food partner et sponsor vainqueurs d’étape ▪️ Le jeu du meilleur grimpeur (maillot blanc à pois bleux) par Primeo Energie ▪️ Le teaser 2026: https://lnkd.in/ea5ngNNP ▪️ L’expérience immersive offerte aux invités VIP ▪️ Des partenaires-clés tels que Orange Cyberdefense Switzerland (Wi-Fi 7) et Swiss Wine Promotion Au-delà de la compétition, cette course du WorldTour de l’ Union Cycliste Internationale s’affirme comme une plateforme alliant sport et économie, convivialité et ancrage régional. 📩 Tout savoir du TDR et ses coulisses: abonnez-vous à sa newsletter. Toutes les éditions disponibles en ligne ici: https://lnkd.in/eJwymf7F Avec : Banque du Léman Loterie Romande #JouezSport ! RTS - Radio Télévision Suisse CHICCO D'ORO #TDRnonstop #TDRinside #TourDeRomandie #CyclismeSuisse #Partnership #Innovation #Suisse #Romandie #réseautage

item.title: The Paterberg: a Decade of Heroics | Ronde van Vlaanderen (2010-2019) 🔥
🚴‍♂️ Koszalin gospodarzem mety 1. etapu 83. Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour! 3 sierpnia peleton wystartuje z Gdyni, by po...
item.description: 🚴‍♂️ Koszalin gospodarzem mety 1. etapu 83. Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour! 3 sierpnia peleton wystartuje z Gdyni, by po emocjonującej trasie przez Pomorze finiszować w Koszalinie. Szykuje się dynamiczna i widowiskowa końcówka! 🔥 W dzisiejszej konferencji udział wzięli Tomasz Sobieraj - Prezydent Miasta Koszalin oraz Czesław Lang - Dyrektor Generalny wyścigu. Do zobaczenia na trasie! 🚴‍♀️🔥 @miasto_koszalin @tomasz.sobieraj ________ 🚴‍♂️ Koszalin to host the finish of Stage 1 of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour! On August 3, the peloton will start in Gdynia and, after an exciting route through the Pomerania region, will finish in Koszalin. A dynamic and spectacular finale is expected! 🔥 Today’s conference featured Tomasz Sobieraj, Mayor of Koszalin, and Czesław Lang, the General Director of the race. See you along the route! 🚴‍♀️🔥 #tourdepologne #koszalin #wyscig

item.title: In Flanders Fields past Sunday was one for the books. Just when we thought we’d see another nostalgic showdown between Mathieu van...
item.description: In Flanders Fields past Sunday was one for the books. Just when we thought we’d see another nostalgic showdown between Mathieu van der Poel and Wout van Aert at the finish in Wevelgem, they were caught by the peloton. After a fierce attack of Mathieu Van der Poel on the Kemmelberg, Wout Van Aert had to dig deep to stay with him, while others struggled to keep up. With the peloton dangerously close, Alec Segaert bridged to the two leaders, giving one last heroic push. But when all three were caught, it was Jasper Philipsen who stayed ice-cold and claimed victory in a thrilling sprint. On the women’s side, the top favourite Lorena Wiebes proved her class once again. She controlled the final group with authority, forced the decisive selection on the Kemmelberg, and timed her sprint perfectly. Although a tiny lapse nearly allowed Fleur Moors, the 20-year-old Belgian revelation of the season, to snatch the win. In a breathtaking finish, Wiebes just edged out Moors, showing that even after an impressive Kemmelberg attack, precision and composure matter until the last meter. Congratulations to all riders and a huge thank you to all the partners, volunteers and supporters who made the day possible. KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), MyWhoosh , Gemeentebestuur Middelkerke , Gemeente Wevelgem , Sport Vlaanderen and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #FLCS #SetThePace #IFF26

item.description: 12 years later, #LaVuelta26 returns to Aramón Valdelinares ⛰️ The last time was in 2014, when Winner Anacona took the victory in a stage marked by the rain… and where Contador began to make the difference in the overall standings 🔥 12 años después, #LaVuelta26 regresa a Aramón Valdelinares ⛰️ La última vez fue en 2014, cuando Winner Anacona se llevó la victoria en una etapa marcada por la lluvia… y en la que Contador empezó a marcar diferencias en la general 🔥

RT by @Milano_Sanremo: RT by @Milano_Sanremo: Estos son algunos de los comentarios que hemos recibido tanto en nuestras redes sociales como en publicaciones relacionadas con la caída en la @Milano_Sanremo. Desde LABORAL Kutxa y el equipo Laboral Kutxa Euskadi estaremos siempre del lado de las mujeres y los hombres que luchan por sus sueños, y en contra de quienes intentan pisarlos. Este equipo ha defendido siempre que las mujeres deben tener el espacio que merecen en la élite, y este tipo de comentarios y comportamientos evidencian que aún queda camino por recorrer. #Matria #laluchasigue

item.title: We had the honor of partnering with the legendary E3! Together with HLN! ❤️ For three weeks, everyone had the chance to ...
item.description: We had the honor of partnering with the legendary E3! Together with HLN! ❤️ For three weeks, everyone had the chance to compete on the equally legendary E3 climb to clock the best time possible! Today was the day to compare those times with those of the pros! How fast did you go? How fast did Van Der Poel go? You can find all the times on Startracking: https://www.star-tracking.be/eventresult/1051 Congrats to the overal winner @jonasdefruytier 🔥 We’re grateful for this wonderful period that got so many of us back on our bikes with joy! 🫶🏼 #cycling #strava #legends #watts #stravacycling

Grupa Transportowa pozostaje partnerem logistycznym Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour i wszystkich wyścigów Lang Team - to k...
item.description: Grupa Transportowa pozostaje partnerem logistycznym Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour i wszystkich wyścigów Lang Team - to kontynuacja współpracy, która od lat wspiera organizację największego wyścigu etapowego w tej części Europy 🚴‍♂️ Za sprawnym przebiegiem wyścigu stoi ogromna operacja logistyczna - tysiące kilometrów, setki punktów i praca wielu ludzi, zsynchronizowana z rytmem peletonu. „To dla nas coś więcej niż sponsoring - to coroczny test operacyjny w terenie” - podkreśla Tomasz Macherowski, Prezes Grupy Transportowej. Więcej o kulisach tej współpracy przeczytacie na naszej stronie internetowej 👉 https://www.tourdepologne.pl/…/grupa-transportowa-pozostaj…/ ✅ ------ Grupa Transportowa remains the logistics partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour and all Lang Team races - a continued partnership that has supported the organization of the biggest stage race in this part of Europe for years 🚴‍♂️ Behind the smooth running of the race stands a massive logistics operation - thousands of kilometers, hundreds of locations and the work of many people, all synchronized with the rhythm of the peloton. “This is more than sponsorship for us - it’s an annual operational test in real conditions,” emphasizes Tomasz Macherowski, CEO of Grupa Transportowa. Read more about the behind-the-scenes of this partnership on our website 👉 https://www.tourdepologne.pl/…/grupa-transportowa-remains-…/ ✅

Więcej o kulisach tej współpracy przeczytacie na naszej stronie internetowej ------ Grupa Transportowa remains the logistics partner of the Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour and all Lang Team races - a continued partnership that has supported the organization of the biggest stage race in this part of Europe for years 🚴‍♂️ Behind the smooth running of the race stands a massive logistics operation - thousands of kilometers, hundreds of locations and the work of many people, all synchronized with the rhythm of the peloton. “This is more than sponsorship for us - it’s an annual operational test in real conditions,” emphasizes Tomasz Macherowski, CEO of Grupa Transportowa. Read more about the behind-the-scenes of this partnership on our website

item.title: RT by @Milano_Sanremo: RT by @Milano_Sanremo: La mejor noticia que podíamos recibir 💜 Tras varios días marcados por la prudencia y el seguimiento médico constante, Debora Silvestri ha evolucionado favorablemente y ya puede continuar su recuperación fuera del hospital. Después de seis días hospitalizada, Debora ha recibido el alta y ya se encuentra de camino a casa, donde seguirá con su proceso de recuperación junto a su familia y arropada por todo el equipo. El cuerpo médico del equipo seguirá a su lado en cada paso de la recuperación, priorizando siempre que su situación avance en las mejores condiciones posibles. Forza Debora 💜 #LaboralKutxaEuskadi

item.title: Not just cycling, a place for everyone. 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞’𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐜𝐬. 🤝 | #FLCS
The most iconic week in cycling is almost here. The cobbles, the climbs, the history... The holy Flemish cycling week is about to...
item.description: The most iconic week in cycling is almost here. The cobbles, the climbs, the history... The holy Flemish cycling week is about to begin. A moment where tradition meets passion, and where the sport connects generations of fans across the world. But this year, we look at these races through a different lens. They don’t belong to just a few. They belong to everyone: from lifelong fans to new audiences, from elite riders to everyday cyclists. The spirit of the classics is something we all share. That’s why these races are 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞’𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐜𝐬. It highlights the values we cherish: inclusion, diversity, and the universal love for cycling. Because no matter who you are or where you come from, there is a place for you on every road. #SetThePace #FLCS

item.title: #Adv La @milanosanremo_ non è solo una gara, è una lezione. Una corsa che sulla carta sembra semplice… ma che in realtà ...
item.description: #Adv La @milanosanremo_ non è solo una gara, è una lezione. Una corsa che sulla carta sembra semplice… ma che in realtà è la più difficile da interpretare. Perché un atleta puoi arrivare perfetto dopo ore di fatica e poi giocarsi tutto negli ultimi 5 km. La Cipressa, il Poggio di Sanremo, la tensione che sale, il gruppo che si muove... È questo che rende questa corsa una Classica Monumento. E viverla nel dietro le quinte per me è stata un’emozione incredibile. #MilanoSanremo

item.title: Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour ponownie partnerem głównym PEKAO @bikeexpo.pl i NARODOWEGO TESTU ROWEROWEGO 2026 - wydarz...
item.description: Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour ponownie partnerem głównym PEKAO @bikeexpo.pl i NARODOWEGO TESTU ROWEROWEGO 2026 - wydarzenia, które na stałe wpisało się w kalendarz polskiego kolarstwa. 11-12 kwietnia PGE Narodowy w Warszawie stanie się miejscem spotkania całego środowiska - od pasjonatów po profesjonalistów. W programie m.in. testy sprzętu, spotkania z ekspertami oraz gwiazdami peletonu: Rafałem Majką, Fabio Aru i Czesławem Langiem. Nie zabraknie także naszej strefy z ofertą specjalną na pakiety startowe w ORLEN Lang Team Race! Wpadajcie na stoisko, bo ich liczba jest ograniczona! Do zobaczenia w Warszawie 🚴‍♂️ ------ Tour de Pologne once again becomes the main partner of PEKAO BIKE EXPO and the National Bike Test 2026 - an event firmly established in the Polish cycling calendar. On April 11-12, PGE Narodowy in Warsaw will bring together the entire cycling community-from passionate enthusiasts to professionals. The program includes equipment testing, expert talks, and meetings with stars of the peloton such as Rafał Majka, Fabio Aru, and Czesław Lang. Be sure to visit our zone, where we’ll have a special offer on entry packages for the ORLEN Lang Team Race series. Quantities are limited, so don’t miss out! See you in Warsaw 🚴‍♂️

item.title: 🚴♂️ VIP-pladser til Copenhagen Sprint er nu sat til salg! Når Copenhagen Sprint indtager København, bliver det en dag med høj inten...
item.description: 🚴♂️ VIP-pladser til Copenhagen Sprint er nu sat til salg! Når Copenhagen Sprint indtager København, bliver det en dag med høj intensitet, stærke præstationer og en helt særlig stemning i byens gader. Vil du opleve løbet fra første parket? I vores VIP-zone får du en eksklusiv ramme om dagen – ideel til både netværk og gode oplevelser med kolleger, kunder eller samarbejdspartnere. Ønsker I jeres eget område, tilbyder vi også private VIP-setups, hvor I kan invitere kunder eller medarbejdere til en unik dag omkring Copenhagen Sprint. 👉 Muligt ved minimum 100 personer. 📩 Kontakt: Mathias Pedersen : mathias.pedersen@cyklingdanmark.dk Læs mere her: https://lnkd.in/e8xJu3Ej

item.title: #adv La prima cosa che mi viene in mente se mi dicono SANREMO? ☀️ Il mare? Il Festival? No. L’energia di una corsa che h...
item.description: #adv La prima cosa che mi viene in mente se mi dicono SANREMO? ☀️ Il mare? Il Festival? No. L’energia di una corsa che ha fatto la storia. 🚴🏻‍♀️ Questo weekend ho vissuto da vicino la @milanosanremo_ e sì… ero lì soprattutto per la Sanremo Women 🩷🌸 Tornata lo scorso anno dopo più di 20 anni. Oggi posso raccontarvela come merita! Tra backstage, corsa e momenti rubati, ho visto da vicino cosa significa davvero essere lì: la concentrazione, la determinazione, il ritmo che non perdona. E poi quell’emozione difficile da spiegare, che ti resta addosso anche quando tutto finisce ✨ A me ha lasciato questo: brividi, adrenalina, vita pura. E forse è proprio qui il punto.. Non dobbiamo “scoprire” lo sport femminile, ma iniziare, finalmente, a riconoscerlo. #MilanoSanremo #SanremoWomen

item.title: The power behind a Cipressa record 💥 8.1km after crashing at Milano-Sanremo, and following a breakneck chase, Tadej Pog...
item.description: The power behind a Cipressa record 💥 8.1km after crashing at Milano-Sanremo, and following a breakneck chase, Tadej Pogačar distanced everyone except for Tom Pidcock and Mathieu Van der Poel with this ferocious acceleration on the Cipressa. He went on to set a new record for the 5.7km climb of 8:50 and then won the race in a sprint against Pidcock.

item.title: He’s the only men's rider in history to go back-to-back at the Santos Tour Down Under, but @daryl.impey's connection to ...
item.description: He’s the only men's rider in history to go back-to-back at the Santos Tour Down Under, but @daryl.impey's connection to Australia goes much deeper than the podium.⁣ ⁣ From winning the Ochre Jersey to now calling Australia home, Daryl shares how the TDU played a defining role in his career and transition from professional cyclist to Sports Director for @ineosgrenadiers.⁣ ⁣ “And it was one of the defining points of my career, because after being a teammate for Simon Gerrans and Caleb Ewan here, it was my first real big opportunity to do something and to nail it gave me that confidence.⁣ ⁣ “Then to do it again the next year was special.”⁣ ⁣ Read more about life after the peloton for this honorary Aussie at the link in our bio.⁣ ⁣ @santos_ltd #TourDownUnder

item.title: He’s the only men's rider in history to go back-to-back at the Santos Tour Down Under, but Daryl Impey’s connection to A...
item.description: He’s the only men's rider in history to go back-to-back at the Santos Tour Down Under, but Daryl Impey’s connection to Australia goes much deeper than the podium. From winning the Ochre Jersey to now calling Australia home, Daryl shares how the TDU played a defining role in his career and transition from professional cyclist to Sports Director for INEOS Grenadiers. Read more about life after the peloton for this honorary Aussie: https://bit.ly/40JUjv1

item.description: Sterke media partnerships = maximale koersbeleving. Dankzij onze mediapartners kan iedereen E3 Saxo Classic volgen: van live wedstrijdbeelden en online verslaggeving tot podiumshow en radio-achter-de-schermen. 📺 Live uitzending op VTM & VTM GO en Eurosport 📰 Live sportverslaggeving via HLN 🎤 Podiumshow via Focus WTV, online via HLN én Radio 2 📻 Heel de dag koersverhalen achter de schermen op Radio 2 Dank aan alle partners om Vlaanderens Spectaculairste mee mogelijk te maken. DPG Media België #E3SaxoClassic #VlaanderensSpectaculairste

item.title: A champion’s move: Sanremo Women 2026 belongs to Lotte Kopecky
item.description: Lotte Kopecky wins the Sanremo Women 2026 presented by Crédit Agricole, beating Noemi Rüegg and Eleonora Gasparrini in a sprint finish.

item.title: Another step into legend: Tadej Pogačar has won Milano–Sanremo 2026
item.description: Tadej Pogačar wins the Milano Sanremo 2026 sprint after a thrilling battle with Thomas Pidcock. Wout Van Aert takes third.

item.title: RT by @Milano_Sanremo: #Sanremowomen Update on @KNiewiadoma. Kasia was assessed by our team doctor and sustained multiple cuts and bruises. We will continue to monitor her recovery closely. We wish Kasia, along with everyone else involved in today’s crashes, a smooth and speedy recovery. 🙌 pic.
item.description: #Sanremowomen Update on @KNiewiadoma . Kasia was assessed by our team doctor and sustained multiple cuts and bruises. We will continue to monitor her recovery closely. We wish Kasia, along with everyone else involved in today’s crashes, a smooth and speedy recovery. 🙌 pic.twitter.com/KSUNwhF4uc — CANYON//SRAM zondacrypto (@WMNcycling) March 21, 2026

🌲 International Day of Forests 🌲 Some stadiums have no walls or roofs. Cycling allows us to travel through landscapes...
item.description: 🌲 International Day of Forests 🌲 Some stadiums have no walls or roofs. Cycling allows us to travel through landscapes that seem taken from a dream, and today we remember that being privileged guests is, above all, a commitment to respecting and caring for our environment 🚲💚 🌲 Día Internacional de los Bosques 🌲 Hay estadios que no tienen muros ni techos. El ciclismo nos permite recorrer paisajes que parecen sacados de un sueño y hoy recordamos que ser invitados de lujo es, ante todo, un compromiso con el respeto y el cuidado de nuestro entorno 💚 #lavueltaesmas #masesmenos 📸 Cxcling Creative Agency

item.title: OFICJALNIE! 🚴‍♂️🇵🇱 Prezentacja drużyn 83. Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour odbędzie się w wyjątkowym miejscu - na pokła...
item.description: OFICJALNIE! 🚴‍♂️🇵🇱 Prezentacja drużyn 83. Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour odbędzie się w wyjątkowym miejscu - na pokładzie historycznego ORP „Błyskawica” w Gdyni! Już 2 sierpnia 2026 będziecie mogli zobaczyć inaugurację wyścigu w przestrzeni, która połączy sportowe emocje z morską historią Polski. Dziękujemy generałowi broni Wojska Polskiego, Dowódcy Generalnemu Rodzajów Sił Zbrojnych - Markowi Sokołowskiemu, za zgodę i wsparcie tego wyjątkowego pomysłu oraz dowódcy ORP „Błyskawica”, kmdr. por. Pawłowi Ogórkowi, za zaangażowanie w organizację wydarzenia 🫡. Dziękujemy również władzom Akademii Marynarki Wojennej, którzy są zaangażowani w przygotowanie tej inauguracji. ⚓️ Dodatkowo serdeczne podziękowania kierujemy do ALAIN Mompert Ambassadeur du Tour de Pologne - Konsula Honorowego Francji na Pomorzu oraz wieloletniego Ambasadora Tour de Pologne – za jego wsparcie logistyczne przy procesowaniu tego przedsięwzięcia 💛 To będzie naprawdę wyjątkowy moment i wspaniałe otwarcie Tour de Pologne! Nie może Was zabraknąć! 🔥 P.S to nie koniec niespodzianek 🤫 _______ 🇺🇸 OFFICIAL! 🚴‍♂️🇵🇱 The team presentation of the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI World Tour will take place in a truly unique setting - aboard the historic ORP “Błyskawica” in Gdynia! On August 2, 2026, you will witness the race inauguration in a space that blends top-level sporting emotions with Poland’s rich maritime history. We would like to thank Lieutenant General Marek Sokołowski, General Commander of the Armed Forces of Poland, for his approval and support of this exceptional idea, as well as the Commander of ORP “Błyskawica”, Lieutenant Commander Paweł Ogórek, for his involvement in organizing the event 🫡 We would also like to thank the authorities of Akademia Marynarki Wojennej, who are involved in preparing this inauguration. ⚓️ Additionally, our sincere thanks go to Alain Mompert – Honorary Consul of France in Pomerania and long-time Ambassador of the Tour de Pologne – for his logistical support and assistance in organizing this project 💛 This will be a truly special moment and a spectacular opening of the Tour de Pologne. You don’t want to miss it! 🔥 P.S. This is not the end of surprises 🤫 #gdynia #100latggdyni #tourdepologne

item.title: Meet our FLCS Clubhouse! From 2 to 6 April, Flanders Classics opens the doors of its FLCS Clubhouse presented by MyWhoosh for the...
item.description: Meet our FLCS Clubhouse! From 2 to 6 April, Flanders Classics opens the doors of its FLCS Clubhouse presented by MyWhoosh for the first time at the Wintercircus Ghent . It will be a place where sport and lifestyle come together in the week of the Tour of Flanders. On the programme? Indoor cycling, running, Pilates and much more. Social runs, rides and virtual challenges are not the first things that come to mind when you think of Flanders Classics. In the sporting world, our company remains largely synonymous with professional cycling, the Flemish spring classics and cyclo‑cross. With this initiative we want to show that we are not blind to the constantly evolving world of sport. It is from this observation that FLCS Clubhouse was born, says Tomas Van Den Spiegel, CEO of Flanders Classics: “We give each of our races a recognisable identity and with FLCS Clubhouse we now want to build further on Flanders Classics’ identity as a company. It is a concept that matches perfectly with the kind of company we want to be: an innovative organiser that places community and experiences for fans and active athletes at the heart of what we do.” The 5-day programme is now live: https://bit.ly/4rOOXtr #FLCS #SetThePace 100% / Salomon / Sportful / Neversecond Benelux / La Marzocco / Lidl België & Luxemburg / Rite.Studios / Octane Racing / Ghent Running Crew / RPM™ Souplesse

item.title: Of course, the Kings couldn’t be left behind with their HLN King of the E3col challenge!!! An attempt that went rather c...
item.description: Of course, the Kings couldn’t be left behind with their HLN King of the E3col challenge!!! An attempt that went rather chaotically, with its fair share of obstacles and gear-shifting issues. However, the tactical approach was a masterpiece of perfection! This resulted in a new top time! Already broken again by a very strong @jonasdefruytier—way to go! Can it get any better than this? Is there more to come? 😳🫣🤷🏻‍♂️ ————————— Ook de Kings mogen uiteraard niet achterblijven met hun HLN King of the E3col challenge!!! Een poging die vrij chaotisch verliep met de nodige hindernissen en schakelproblemen. Echter was de tactische aanpak een staaltje perfectie! Dit resulteerde in een nieuwe toptijd! Ondertussen alweer verbroken door een hele sterke @jonasdefruytier, klasse! Kan dit nog straffer? Komt er nog wat aan? 😳🫣🤷🏻‍♂️

item.description: Stad Harelbeke schakelt een versnelling hoger. Samen met Harelbeke zetten we een volledige week in het teken van de koers met de Week van de Fiets. Een programma vol activiteiten dat inwoners, supporters en bezoekers samenbrengt in aanloop naar E3 Saxo Classic 2026. 📌 Ontdek alle activiteiten in 1 oogopslag via de affiche en plan je week. Tot in Harelbeke, waar de koers leeft. 💙🚴♂️ #E3SaxoClassic #VlaanderensSpectaculairste #Harelbeke

item.title: THE UNDISPUTED KING OF WILLUNGA HILL 👑 Richie Porte’s induction into the Santos Tour Down Under Hall of Fame this year...
item.description: THE UNDISPUTED KING OF WILLUNGA HILL 👑 Richie Porte’s induction into the Santos Tour Down Under Hall of Fame this year celebrates a career defined by dominance on South Australian soil. A two-time overall winner (2017 and 2020) and four-time runner-up, he also claimed eight individual stage victories, including his legendary streak up Willunga Hill every year from 2014 to 2019.

item.title: 🍟 Koersdag = beleving. Op 27 maart trakteren we in de E3 Saxo Arena opnieuw op 500 gratis frietjes (vanaf 13u), dankzij Agristo....
item.description: 🍟 Koersdag = beleving. Op 27 maart trakteren we in de E3 Saxo Arena opnieuw op 500 gratis frietjes (vanaf 13u), dankzij Agristo . Een lekkere actie, maar eentje die de koerssfeer in Harelbeke nóg warmer maakt, voor supporters, vrijwilligers en bezoekers. En wist je, na de 500 gratis frietjes verkopen we ze…en de inkomsten daarvan gaan naar het goede doel: vzw Het Ventiel . 💙🚴♂️ #E3SaxoClassic #VlaanderensSpectaculairste

item.description: That’s the end of @parisnicecourse for another year, and we gave it our all! 🙌🏻 On the final day in Nice, @solermarc93 threw the kitchen sink at it with a long-range raid! In the end, Marc crossed the line in the top 10 to secure his sixth-place position overall 💪 Great job this week, guys. We kept on fighting! #WeAreUAE | #ParisNice

item.title: Sur #ParisNice, Rudy Molard termine 15e de la dernière étape Niçoise. Au classement général, Rémi Cavagna maintient sa 16e place. 15𝑡ℎ 𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑐𝑒 𝑡𝑜𝑑𝑎𝑦 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑅𝑢𝑑𝑦, 𝑤ℎ𝑖𝑙𝑠𝑡 𝑅𝑒́𝑚𝑖 𝑘𝑒𝑒𝑝𝑠 ℎ𝑖𝑠 16𝑡ℎ 𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑙𝑙. pic.
item.description: Sur #ParisNice , Rudy Molard termine 15e de la dernière étape Niçoise. Au classement général, Rémi Cavagna maintient sa 16e place. 15𝑡ℎ 𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑐𝑒 𝑡𝑜𝑑𝑎𝑦 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑅𝑢𝑑𝑦, 𝑤ℎ𝑖𝑙𝑠𝑡 𝑅𝑒́𝑚𝑖 𝑘𝑒𝑒𝑝𝑠 ℎ𝑖𝑠 16𝑡ℎ 𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑙𝑙. pic.twitter.com/68zWXdmoNx — Équipe Cycliste Groupama-FDJ United (@GroupamaFDJ) March 15, 2026

item.title: C'était Paris-Nice. La première course sur le sol français, vêtus de nos nouvelles couleurs. La dernière course au solei...
item.description: C'était Paris-Nice. La première course sur le sol français, vêtus de nos nouvelles couleurs. La dernière course au soleil d'Ion. Au final, une septième place au général, cinq places dans le top 10 sur les étapes. Et surtout, un état d'esprit collectif, avec l'envie de se battre chaque jour. 🤜🏼 On a voulu revenir, avec un œil plus décalé, sur cette semaine à part. 🎥 et ✍🏼 : @mathildelazou

item.title: RT by @parisnice: He threw the kitchen sink at @ParisNice on the final day, but it wasn’t quite enough for a longe-range raid 👏 Bravo, @solermarc93. item.title: RT by @TirrenAdriatico: 💙🔱 The King of the Two Seas! Congratulations to @ISAACDELTOROx1 on winning the 2026 #TirrenoAdriatico overall title! 🏆 Del Toro also becomes the first Mexican rider ever to win the general classification at this race. 🇲🇽 Thanks to all the guys who made this week of racing… pic.
item.description: 💙🔱 The King of the Two Seas! Congratulations to @ISAACDELTOROx1 on winning the 2026 #TirrenoAdriatico overall title! 🏆 Del Toro also becomes the first Mexican rider ever to win the general classification at this race. 🇲🇽 Thanks to all the guys who made this week of racing… pic.twitter.com/QiZhWRgHnH — @UAE-TeamEmirates (@TeamEmiratesUAE) March 15, 2026

item.title: 💛 JEU CONCOURS EXCEPTIONNEL 💛 Et si le prochain vainqueur de Paris-Nice 2026 était déjà chez vous… 👀 Je vous propose ...
item.description: 💛 JEU CONCOURS EXCEPTIONNEL 💛 Et si le prochain vainqueur de Paris-Nice 2026 était déjà chez vous… 👀 Je vous propose de gagner un maillot jaune LCL dédicacé par Jonas Vingegaard. @jonasvingegaard Un souvenir unique pour tous les passionnés de vélo 🚴‍♂️ Pour participer : 1️⃣ Abonnez-vous à nos comptes : @sev_dacosta @maillotjaunelcl @parisnicecourse 2️⃣ Likez et Enregistrez ce post ❤️ 3️⃣ Identifiez en commentaire 2/3 de vos amis fans de vélo 👉 1 ami identifié = 1 chance supplémentaire 🔥 Bonus : partagez ce post en story en me mentionnant @sev_dacosta pour doubler vos chances ! Tirage au sort très prochainement… Alors, qui aimerait avoir ce maillot jaune mythique à la maison ? 💛 Bonne chance à tous #concour #cyclisme #parisnice #maillotjaune

item.title: A huge battle for the overall win 🤯🔱 Isaac del Toro and Giulio Pellizzari put in massive numbers in their fight for th...
item.description: A huge battle for the overall win 🤯🔱 Isaac del Toro and Giulio Pellizzari put in massive numbers in their fight for the Tirreno–Adriatico overall victory. The Mexican stayed calm when the Italian attacked, timing his move to perfection to take the stage and extend his overall lead. Isaac del Toro: ⏱️ Time: 2‘56” 💨 Speed: 16.6km/h 🔥 Max speed: 30.1km/h ⚡ Power: 530w 💥 Max power: 800w Giulio Pellizzari: ⏱️ Time: 3‘18” 💨 Speed: 15.1km/h 🔥 Max speed: 29.0km/h ⚡ Power: 490w 💥 Max power: 790w

item.title: 🚴🇵🇱 Premia ORLEN VITAY Najlepszy Polski Zawodnik ponownie podczas Tour de Pologne! Podczas każdego z etapów 83. edycj...
item.description: 🚴🇵🇱 Premia ORLEN VITAY Najlepszy Polski Zawodnik ponownie podczas Tour de Pologne! Podczas każdego z etapów 83. edycji wyścigu Tour de Pologne będzie premiowany zawodnik z Polski, który osiągnie najlepszy wynik. Otrzyma on nagrodę ORLEN VITAY Najlepszego Polskiego Zawodnika. Przed rokiem w tej klasyfikacji błyszczał Rafał Majka (UAE Team Emirates - XRG), który był najlepszym z Polaków na etapach do Karpacza, Zakopanego i Bukowiny Tatrzańskiej oraz w jeździe indywidualnej na czas wokół Kopalni Soli “Wieliczka”. W sprinterskich końcówkach w Legnicy i Cieszynie najszybszym z Biało-Czerwonych okazał się Stanisław Aniołkowski (Cofidis). Kibicujcie Polakom podczas 83.Tour de Pologne! 🇵🇱🔥 @orlenteam_official #ORLEN #TdP 📸 @szymon_gruchalski_sports

item.title: Van vélo naar helikopter 🚁 @gregvanavermaet kennen we van de kasseien & hellingen van de @e3_saxoclassic. Dit jaar beki...
item.description: Van vélo naar helikopter 🚁 @gregvanavermaet kennen we van de kasseien & hellingen van de @e3_saxoclassic. Dit jaar bekijkt hij de koers vanuit onze cockpit! In onze nieuwste video doet Greg een initiatievlucht met Toran en ontdekt hij hoe het voelt om zelf een helikopter te besturen boven het E3-parcours. En goed nieuws: tijdens de E3 kan jij dat ook beleven samen met Greg! Stap in voor een luchtdoop boven Harelbeke en ontdek het parcours vanuit de lucht. 🎟 Boek snel je vlucht via 👉 fly.toran.be/event/e3/ 💪 Powered by @abutriekservices 📅 Vrijdag 27 maart 📍 Forestiersstadion, Harelbeke Let your dreams take flight 🚁 🎬 @imagoo.tv #e3saxoclassic #gregvanavermaet #helikopter #luchtdoop

item.title: Who will be crowned King of the HLN E3 Col!? 👑 We had the honor of guiding Olympic champion @gregvanavermaet on his KOM...
item.description: Who will be crowned King of the HLN E3 Col!? 👑 We had the honor of guiding Olympic champion @gregvanavermaet on his KOM attempt! A legendary rider, a legendary moment for us 🫶🏼 and rest assured, he’s still got it! 🔥 We challenge you to try and match Greg’s time in this challenge in collaboration with HLN and the E3! GO for it in true King’s style! 🤍💛 ————————— Wie wordt de King van de HLN E3 Col!? Wij hadden de eer om Olympisch kampioen Greg Van Avermaet te leiden (lijden) naar zijn KOM attempt! Legendarische vent, legendarisch moment voor ons en wees gerust, he still got it! We dagen jullie uit om Greg zijn tijd te proberen evenaren tijdens deze challenge in samenwerking met HLN en de E3, laat jullie gaan in ware Kings’s stijl! #strava #e3 #hln #kingsoftheflemishmountains #challenge

item.title: #ADV Un anno fa ero solo, nel nulla, pedalando verso Capo Nord. Oggi non sono più solo. Strade Bianche non è solo una ga...
item.description: #ADV Un anno fa ero solo, nel nulla, pedalando verso Capo Nord. Oggi non sono più solo. Strade Bianche non è solo una gara. È un’atmosfera: la città viva, i team che si preparano, quell’attesa prima che passi il gruppo. La Fan-Zone delle Tolfe, Siena, la musica, i brindisi… e quella sensazione che qualcosa di bello sta per succedere. Il gruppo passa in dieci secondi, ma la giornata resta. L’anno scorso pedalavo da solo. Oggi pedalo dentro un’emozione condivisa con migliaia di persone. @strade_bianche #StradeBianche

Very proud to announce the start of a new international chapter. Flanders Classics and Playground are joining forces to accelerate...
item.description: Very proud to announce the start of a new international chapter. Flanders Classics and Playground are joining forces to accelerate the development of endurance events in France and the BENELUX region. By combining Playground’s expertise in running events with the cycling know-how of Flanders Classics, the partnership aims to further grow running in the BENELUX and cycling in France. Tomas Van Den Spiegel, CEO of Flanders Classics: “Playground shares our vision of demanding, authentic events that are deeply rooted in their territories. This partnership allows us to combine our expertise to imagine new formats, reach new communities and accelerate the sustainable development of running and cycling across Europe.” #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: From the buzzing start in Antwerp to the iconic finish in Oudenaarde, the Ronde van Vlaanderen is more than just a race, it's Flem...
item.description: From the buzzing start in Antwerp to the iconic finish in Oudenaarde, the Ronde van Vlaanderen is more than just a race, it's Flemish cycling heritage. Do you want to feel the thunder of the peloton and see the decisive moves from the best seats in the house? Our VIP programme takes you deep into the heart of Flanders’ Finest. Experience the Ronde like never before. 🔗 https://bit.ly/4rTuQv3 #FLCS #SetThePace #RVV26

Her immediate impressions, the key moments of the race, and her answers to questions from professional cycling journalists. Segui in diretta la conferenza stampa della vincitrice di Strade Bianche Women Elite Crédit Agricole 2026. Le sue sensazioni a caldo, i momenti chiave della corsa e le sue risposte alle domande dei giornalisti di settore.

item.title: On Ronde van Vlaanderen day, you can be one of 100 riders to ride the final 100 km, cheered on by thousands of fans! Before the pr...
item.description: On Ronde van Vlaanderen day, you can be one of 100 riders to ride the final 100 km, cheered on by thousands of fans! Before the pros storm over the hills and cobbles, you can ride the same legendary 100 km final during the official Ronde van Vlaanderen Fan Ride. Imagine conquering the iconic climbs, feeling the support of the fans, and crossing the finish line just hours before the world’s best riders. From the first pedal stroke to the final cobbled meters, this is your chance to experience the Tour of Flanders atmosphere up close. Only a few spots left in this unique event. More info & registrations via hospitality@flandersclassics.be . #FLCS #SetThePace #RVV26

item.title: Matthew Brennan makes history at Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne 2026 - Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne
item.description: On Sunday 1 March 2026, Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne once again delivered a thrilling edition. After a hectic and attacking race, 20-year-old British talent Matthew Brennan sprinted to his first victory in a Flemish Classic — a win that perfectly reflects the DNA and identity of Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne: Where Legends Are Born.

item.title: Simon Defrance triumphs at Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne Juniors 2026 - Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne
item.description: On Sunday 1 March 2026, Kuurne once again showcased the stars of tomorrow. After an animated race, French rider Simon Defrance claimed victory in the 35th edition of Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne Juniors — a result that perfectly reflects the race motto: Where Legends Are Born.

item.title: Parcoursupdate E3 Saxo Classic 2026: nóg meer koers in de finale! 😉 Dit jaar trekken we twee keer over de Oude Kwaremont en krijgt...
item.description: Parcoursupdate E3 Saxo Classic 2026: nóg meer koers in de finale! 😉 Dit jaar trekken we twee keer over de Oude Kwaremont en krijgt de E3-Col een nog centralere rol in het wedstrijdverloop. Die keuzes zijn bewust gemaakt: we willen een wedstrijd die van ver openbreekt en waarin positionering, timing en durf het verschil maken. Het resultaat? Always Race, Altijd Koers. 📍 Vrijdag 27 maart 2026 in Harelbeke. Tot dan?

item.title: The Ecuadorian champ, @jhonatan_narvaez97, turns 29 today 🎂⁣ ⁣ After making an impressive first appearance at the Santo...
item.description: The Ecuadorian champ, @jhonatan_narvaez97, turns 29 today 🎂⁣ ⁣ After making an impressive first appearance at the Santos Tour Down Under in 2024 to take second place, he returned a year later with @uaeteamemirates to claim the 2025 overall title. A moment for the history books as the first Ecuadorian to take the GC in South Australia. ⁣ Happy birthday, Jhonny!

item.title: The 2026–2027 Union Cycliste Internationale Cyclo-cross World Cup calendar is now officially complete as Glasgow, Scotland secures...
item.description: The 2026–2027 Union Cycliste Internationale Cyclo-cross World Cup calendar is now officially complete as Glasgow, Scotland secures the final spot and will host round three in Kelvingrove Park on the 13th of December 2026. Tomas Van Den Spiegel, CEO of Flanders Classics, said: "We have been working on bringing a UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup event to Great Britain for several years and are delighted to be able to announce Glasgow for next winter. Introducing a new venue is always special, especially in a major city like Glasgow, and we are looking forward to a great collaboration with British Cycling ." See you in December! #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: Onze officiële E3 Saxo Classic retro collectie is live. 🧢💙 Met deze collectie brengen we een knipoog naar onze geschiedenis, verta...
item.description: Onze officiële E3 Saxo Classic retro collectie is live. 🧢💙 Met deze collectie brengen we een knipoog naar onze geschiedenis, vertaald naar items die koersliefhebbers graag dragen op en naast de kasseien. We zijn trots dat we dit opnieuw kunnen activeren in samenwerking met AD Delhaize Harelbeke . Via een lokale zegelactie krijgen supporters de kans om exclusieve gadgets aan een voordeelprijs te verzamelen. Zo verbinden we koers, community en retail op een laagdrempelige manier. De volledige collectie is ook beschikbaar via onze webshop 👉 https://e3webshop.be #E3SaxoClassic #VlaanderensSpectaculairste

item.title: The Spring Classics season has officially begun. Last Saturday, Omloop Nieuwsblad once again opened the road cycling spring in s...
item.description: The Spring Classics season has officially begun. Last Saturday, Omloop Nieuwsblad once again opened the road cycling spring in style between Ghent and Ninove. With commanding performances, Mathieu van der Poel and Demi Vollering claimed victory in the first cobbled Classic of the year. Mathieu van der Poel imposed himself on the race with authority. In his first Omloop Nieuwsblad, he stayed calm under pressure and when it mattered most, he turned a selective finale into a decisive victory on the Muur-Kapelmuur, confirming his status as one of the absolute benchmarks of the peloton. On the women’s side, Demi Vollering delivered a masterclass in composure and team tactics. With a perfectly timed attack in Geraardsbergen, she rode clear to the finish alongside Katarzyna Niewiadoma before finishing it off with a powerful sprint. A special milestone as well, her first victory in Ninove. Well done! Thank you to everyone involved for making it such a brilliant day of racing. KBC Bank & Verzekering , Proximus Group , KPMG Belgium , Lidl België & Luxemburg , Lotto ( Nationale Loterij ), Alken-Maes , Eneco Belgium , Tudor Watch , BMW Belux , Kwaremont ( Brouwerij De Brabandere ), Nieuwsblad , Stad Gent , Stad Ninove , Sport Vlaanderen , and Cycling in Flanders ( Toerisme Vlaanderen - VISITFLANDERS ). #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: 👀 Her kommer en ret spændende mulighed for virksomheder, der ønsker at tage del i Copenhagen Sprint-festen! Vi åbner nemlig op for...
item.description: 👀 Her kommer en ret spændende mulighed for virksomheder, der ønsker at tage del i Copenhagen Sprint-festen! Vi åbner nemlig op for muligheden for at blive en del af vores mobile reklamekaravane, der skaber liv, underholdning og stemning langs rundstrækningen i København. Karavanen cykler på rundstrækningen og stopper ved udvalgte hot spots, hvor der samples og skabes fest med lyd og energi. I tidsrummet er der ikke anden aktivitet på ruten, og vi kommer til at køre så tæt på det professionelle felt som muligt. 🚴♀️ Som publikumspartner får I jeres brand eksponeret direkte i bybilledet via vores ladcykler samtidig med, at I bliver en del af det festlige set-up til Copenhagen Sprint. Lyder det interessant? Så tag fat i Mathias Pedersen her eller på: mape@cyklingdanmark.dk

item.title: www.igormartins.com Pelas estradas soalheiras do sul de Portugal, atravessando as planícies agrícolas e percorrendo as c...
item.description: www.igormartins.com Pelas estradas soalheiras do sul de Portugal, atravessando as planícies agrícolas e percorrendo as curvas montanhosas, empedradas, por vezes, ou esquentadas pelo alcatrão, assim foi a Volta ao Algarve. Com paisagens incríveis e público emotivo, foram cerca de 700km de muito suor, sofrimento, alegrias e companheirismo. Um desfile de estrelas, desde as equipas mundiais às continentais portuguesas, fizeram o deleite dos aficionados, privilegiados pela enorme proximidade que o ciclismo permite. ... Along the sunny roads of southern Portugal, crossing agricultural plains and traveling along the mountain curves, cobbled, sometimes, or heated by tar, that was the Volta ao Algarve. With incredible landscapes and an enthusiastic crowd, it was about 700km of much sweat, suffering, joy and companionship. A parade of stars, from world teams to Portuguese continental teams, delighted the fans, privileged by the great proximity that cycling allows. Algarve, Portugal © 2026 Igor Martins / FPC #voltaaoalgarve #fpc #ciclismo #sonyalpha #sonyportugal

item.title: Flanders Classics and KPMG Belgium are extending their collaboration within the Closing The Gap project, reaffirming a shared comm...
item.description: Flanders Classics and KPMG Belgium are extending their collaboration within the Closing The Gap project, reaffirming a shared commitment to sustainable and equal women’s cycling. With the category upgrades of Dwars door Vlaanderen and Scheldeprijs, all women’s races will ultimately reach the same competition level as their male equivalents in 2026. In recent years, not only has the professional peloton benefited from the FLCS Women project, but registrations among girls at the Tour of Flanders Youth Day have doubled as well. Building on this momentum, the partnership will continue over the next three years to further strengthen the future of women’s cycling. Growing women’s cycling further internationally also means helping to build it from the grassroots up. With rapid professionalisation, there is a need for a strong and sustainable inflow of young talent. Tomas Van Den Spiegel: "In 2022, at the first Tour of Flanders Youth Day, the girls U17 and U19 cycled together due to the lower number of entries. But for the upcoming fifth edition, no fewer than 45 girls U19 teams have applied, of which we can accept only 25. It’s a clear signal of growth and potential. In this way, we are also doing our bit to close the gap, not only at the professional top but also at the grassroots level.” #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: A Week at the “Algarvia” with the fastest riders in the World! Side by side with riders I had only ever watched on TV. T...
item.description: A Week at the “Algarvia” with the fastest riders in the World! Side by side with riders I had only ever watched on TV. The Algarve didn’t disappoint: stunning landscapes, crowds lining the roads, music, energy, and iconic places like Alte… the perfect backdrop for any cycling photographer. Paul Magnier dominated the sprints, winning in Tavira and Lagos. Paul Seixas made history at Alto da Fóia with his first professional victory at just 19, on the same climb where Tadej Pogačar won his first pro race in 2019. Filippo Ganna powered through the Vilamoura time trial, showing incredible strength, and Juan Ayuso conquered Malhão to take the overall win. Paul, Paul, Paul… Magnier. Paul, Paul, Paul… Seixas. Filippo, Filippo… Ganna. Juan, Juan, Juan… Ayuso. A week at the heart of the race, living the life of a WorldTour photographer: learning, connecting, and feeling genuinely happy. Thanks to my “partner in crime,” @im.igor.martins , everyone involved, the partner teams, and the @fedportciclismo for always trusting me. Cycling gives me so much. I try to give back in the best way I can. It was unforgettable. Shot with Sony A7V/ 28-70 f2/ 70-200 2.8/ 300 2.8 @sony.portugal 📸for @voltalgarve @fedportciclismo
