item.description: De banner voor E3 Saxo Classic 2026 is gelost. 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗿 𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗲 𝗯𝗿𝗶𝗹 𝗸𝗶𝗷𝗸 𝗷𝗶𝗷 𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗿 𝗱𝗲 𝗺𝗲𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗲𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗸𝗲 𝗸𝗼𝗲𝗿𝘀? 🕶️ Op vrijdag 27 maart 2026 staat Stad Harelbeke opnieuw volledig in het teken van Vlaanderens Spectaculairste. Een koers met karakter, een publiek met passie en een sfeer die je live moet voelen langs het parcours. Wie of wat zie jij als eerste in de banner? Laat het ons weten. #banner #E3SaxoClassic #VlaanderensSpectaculairste #Harelbeke

item.title: Follow Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne through various channels - Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne
item.description: You don’t want to miss a single second of the spring classic Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne taking place on Sunday, March 1, 2026? Then we have excellent news. This year, both Kuurne-Brussels-Kuurne for Juniors and Elite can be followed live from start to finish via various channels. From the first team presentation to the final sprint, you will be fully immersed in the race.

item.title: In the modern era of cycling, being connected is everything. That's why we're happy to announce the extended partnership between P...
item.description: In the modern era of cycling, being connected is everything. That's why we're happy to announce the extended partnership between Proximus Group and Flanders Classics. From high-speed data for our production teams to the fans streaming the Paterberg climb on their phones. Proximus ensures that the pulse of the Flemish Spring Classics reaches every corner of the globe. Together, we’re not just celebrating the race, we’re enhancing the digital experience of every fan, rider, and partner involved. Think possible. #FLCS #SetThePace

KBC Bank & Verzekering & Flanders Classics, a partnership written in hills & cobbles. Some things simply belong together. We are...
item.description: KBC Bank & Verzekering & Flanders Classics, a partnership written in hills & cobbles. Some things simply belong together. We are proud to announce that KBC and Flanders Classics have officially extended their long-standing partnership For decades, KBC has been the driving force behind the most legendary races on the calendar. From the first pedal stroke at the Omloop Het Nieuwsblad to the final sprint of De Brabantse Pijl, KBC’s commitment to the sport remains as solid as the Flemish granite. Together, we continue to bring the passion of the Classics to fans, riders, and communities worldwide. Here’s to many more miles of shared history! #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: Bridging heritage and innovation: MyWhoosh x Flanders Classics We are thrilled to announce a groundbreaking partnership between...
item.description: Bridging heritage and innovation: MyWhoosh x Flanders Classics We are thrilled to announce a groundbreaking partnership between Flanders Classics and MyWhoosh. The world-class virtual cycling technology becomes a partner of both our subbrands ROAD and CX. MyWhoosh will be involved in our Spring Classics, Classic Series and the UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup. Together, we are not just honouring the history of cycling; we are building its digital future. #FLCS #SetThePace

Do you want to experience the grit of the cobbles from the comfort of a front-row seat? Our VIP programme offers an unparalleled look at the heart of the race, blending the raw emotion of cycling with world-class hospitality. item.title: UAE TOUR 2026: BIN HAMOODAH AUTO STAGE 1 ROUTE OVERVIEW
Na czym pojadą Twoi faworyci w Tour de Pologne 2026? Gdy peleton rusza z linii startu, widzimy koszulki liderów i twarze...
item.description: Na czym pojadą Twoi faworyci w Tour de Pologne 2026? Gdy peleton rusza z linii startu, widzimy koszulki liderów i twarze mistrzów. Ale tuż pod nimi jest drugi bohater wyścigu – rower. Maszyny WorldTour 2026 to prawdziwe technologiczne potwory: ⚙️ minimum 6,8 kg (limit UCI!) ⚡ bezprzewodowa zmiana biegów 🛞 karbonowe koła i aerodynamiczne ramy jak z F1 💰 wartość od 60 tys. zł do nawet kilkuset tys. zł za kompletny rower Jak bardzo różnią się od „zwykłego” roweru z dobrego sklepu? Dlaczego niektóre zespoły… muszą doważać swoje maszyny? I ile w tym wszystkim znaczy technologia, a ile wciąż noga zawodnika? O tym wszystkim przeczytasz w najnowszym artykule na naszej stronie 👉 Daj znać w komentarzu 👇 Na jakim rowerze Twoim zdaniem najpiękniej prezentuje się peleton? Masz swoją ulubioną markę lub model? 🔥 #ORLEN #TourdePologne #WorldTour #TdP2026 📸 @andrzej_gucwa ----- What will your favorites be riding at the 2026 Tour de Pologne? When the peloton rolls off the start line, we see the leaders’ jerseys and the faces of champions. But just beneath them is the race’s second hero – the bike. The 2026 WorldTour machines are true technological beasts: ⚙️ minimum 6.8 kg (UCI limit!) ⚡ wireless shifting 🛞 carbon wheels and aerodynamic frames straight out of F1 💰 worth as much as 15,000 EUR to hundreds of thousands of euros for a complete bike How different are they from a “regular” high-end bike you can buy in a good shop? Why do some teams actually have to… add weight to their bikes? And how much of it is technology – and how much is still down to the rider’s legs? Read all about it in our latest article on our website 👉 Let us know in the comments 👇 Which bike do you think looks best in the peloton? Do you have a favorite brand or model? 🔥 #ORLEN #TourdePologne #WorldTour #TdP2026

item.title: We Włoszech spędziłem wiele pięknych lat mojego życia. To kraj, który dał mi sportową dojrzałość, doświadczenie i przyja...
item.description: We Włoszech spędziłem wiele pięknych lat mojego życia. To kraj, który dał mi sportową dojrzałość, doświadczenie i przyjaźnie na całe życie. 🇮🇹 Ale niezależnie od tego, gdzie jestem - serce zawsze bije po polsku. 🇵🇱 Ogromnie raduję się, kiedy widzę obecność polskich marek i organizacji podczas międzynarodowych wydarzeń. Każde spotkanie z przedstawicielami to coś więcej niż rozmowa - to ciepło, życzliwość i te wyjątkowe emocje, które towarzyszą spotkaniu rodaka za granicą. Na Zimowych Igrzyskach Olimpijskich obecna jest także nasza @polskaorganizacjaturystyczna - instytucja, która od lat w niezwykle konsekwentny i nowoczesny sposób buduje Polskę, jako markę na świecie. To partner, z którym współpracuję od wielu lat przy organizacji Tour de Pologne. Razem pokazujemy, że sport jest jednym z najpiękniejszych ambasadorów naszego kraju. @tourdepologne to dziś nie tylko wyścig kolarski. To globalna platforma promocji Polski. Jako część elitarnego cyklu UCI World Tour gościmy najlepsze drużyny świata, a przez 5 godzin nieprzerwanej transmisji telewizyjnej docieramy do ponad 65 państw. W tym czasie świat widzi nie tylko rywalizację na najwyższym poziomie, ale także nasze miasta, regiony, krajobrazy i energię ludzi. To ogromna wartość promocyjna i dowód na to, że potrafimy organizować wydarzenia na absolutnie światowym poziomie. Polska coraz śmielej i coraz mocniej zaznacza swoją obecność na arenie międzynarodowej — poprzez sport, turystykę i profesjonalną organizację wielkich wydarzeń. I powiem Wam jedno – kiedy widzę biało-czerwone barwy wśród światowej elity, czuję ogromną radość i dumę. Bo Polska naprawdę ma się czym chwalić! 🇵🇱✨ • turystyka • Polska Organizacja Turystyczna • dumni z Polski • dom Polski • zimowe igrzyska olimpijskie • Mediolan • Cortina

item.title: 🎉 @gdynia_official dziś świętuje 100 lat praw miejskich! To właśnie w tym wyjątkowym, portowym mieście już 3 sierpnia w...
item.description: 🎉 @gdynia_official dziś świętuje 100 lat praw miejskich! To właśnie w tym wyjątkowym, portowym mieście już 3 sierpnia wystartuje 83. Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour. Gdynia – symbol nowoczesnego miasta i dorobku II Rzeczypospolitej – od stu lat dynamicznie się rozwija i zapisuje kolejne karty swojej historii. W 2026 roku na Skwerze Kościuszki zobaczymy najlepsze, kolarskie ekipy na świecie. 💬 „Gdynia była dzieckiem niepodległej, suwerennej Rzeczypospolitej, zbudowanej na ciężkiej pracy, pocie, poświęceniu i pięknych ideałach” — powiedział dziś na uroczystej sesji Rady Miasta Karol Nawrocki, Prezydent RP. Powrót Tour de Pologne do Gdyni ma wymiar symboliczny — ostatni raz wyścig gościł tu w 2004 roku. 83. edycja odbędzie się w dniach 3–9 sierpnia 2026. 🚴‍♂️🌍 Gdynia. Historia. Tour de Pologne. Kolarstwo #ORLEN ------ 🎉 Gdynia celebrates 100 years of city rights today! It is in this unique port city that the 83rd Tour de Pologne UCI WorldTour will kick off on 3 August. Gdynia — a symbol of a modern city and the achievements of the Poland — has been developing dynamically for a hundred years, writing new chapters in its history. In 2026, we will see the world’s best cycling teams on Kościuszko Square. 💬 “Gdynia was a child of an independent, sovereign Republic, built on hard work, sweat, sacrifice, and beautiful ideals,” said Karol Nawrocki, President of the Republic of Poland, today during a ceremonial session of the City Council. The return of the Tour de Pologne to Gdynia is symbolic—the race last visited the city in 2004. The 83rd edition will take place from 3–9 August 2026. 🚴‍♂️🌍 Gdynia. History. Tour de Pologne. Cycling #ORLEN

item.title: The Best of UAE Tour Women 2026
Last Saturday marked round 8 of the Telenet Superprestige, with Middelkerke hosting a thrilling final showdown. With both the Men...
item.description: Last Saturday marked round 8 of the Telenet Superprestige, with Middelkerke hosting a thrilling final showdown. With both the Men and Women Elite general classifications still wide open, everything was on the line. In the Men Elite standings, Niels Vandeputte started the day in the lead, with Michael Vanthourenhout just three points behind. The race itself was decided through perfect teamwork, as Vanthourenhout took the victory after strong support from teammate Gerben Kuypers. Vandeputte finished second, a result that was enough to secure the general classification for the second year in a row. The Women Elite race saw Amandine Fouquenet take control from start to finish. Riding with confidence, she built a comfortable lead and claimed her third victory of this year’s Telenet Superprestige. Ceylin Del Carmen Alvarado came close in the closing stages but had to settle for second place. Aniek van Alphen finished eighth, which proved just enough to secure the overall classification. She ended the series level on points with Fouquenet, but with more race participations, Van Alphen was crowned Telenet Superprestige champion. A remarkable season comes to an end in Middelkerke. We enjoyed every single second of it and already can’t wait for next year’s edition, promising even more spectacle. Thanks to all of our partners for their continued support throughout the season. Telenet group , AD Garage Belgium , Sunseeker Robotics , Isolatiestock BV , Alken-Maes , Electro Depot Belgium , Prik&Tik , ASSA ABLOY Opening Solutions , FrieslandCampina , Kärcher Belux & Ethias . #FLCS #SetThePace

item.description: Twelve courses. Twenty-four races. One season to remember. The #CXWorldCup came to a close in January with the final race in Hoogerheide. World champions Mathieu van der Poel and Lucinda Brand claimed the overall titles for the 2025–2026 season. We want to thank our partners for their support during the season. Ethias , Bingoal Fun, VELUX , Pauwels Sauces , Royal A-ware , Simac , Viessmann Climate Solutions , STIHL Benelux , Alken-Maes and Mercedes-Benz Vans Belgium . https://lnkd.in/eCJV82iD #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: Kunne en cykelinteresseret målgruppe være interessant for jer? Så se lige her 😀 Vi kommer nemlig til at have et expo-område midt i...
item.description: Kunne en cykelinteresseret målgruppe være interessant for jer? Så se lige her 😀 Vi kommer nemlig til at have et expo-område midt i Copenhagen Sprint-festen! 🚴🏻♂️🚴♀️ Expo-området placeres helt op ad ruten og bliver et naturligt samlingspunkt for både cykelfans, familier og nysgerrige forbipasserende. For udstillere betyder det synlighed i et område med høj energi, lang opholdstid og et publikum, der er åbent for dialog, inspiration og nye produkter. Til løbet i 2026 har vi valgt Christian Ritter som ansvarlig for salget af standpladser i Expo-området. Ud over samarbejdet med Copenhagen Sprint er Christian Ritter også manden bag Copenhagen Bike Show, Skandinaviens største cykelmesse. 📧 Lyder det interessant? Så kontakt Christian Ritter på: christian@ritter.dk eller 2042 0006 Læs mere her: https://lnkd.in/dZPH2rkQ

item.title: Flanders Classics is proud to announce PostNL België as an Official Partner of our Classic Series. PostNL has been the official ma...
item.description: Flanders Classics is proud to announce PostNL België as an Official Partner of our Classic Series. PostNL has been the official main sponsor of the Team Picnic PostNL cycling team for some time now. It is now also joining forces with Flanders Classics as an Official Partner during the Ronde van Limburg, Brussels Cycling Classic and Amstel Gold Race. Like Flanders Classics, the logistics e-commerce player attaches great importance to connection and innovation. With a shared belief that sport connects people and drives progress, this partnership brings together cycling heritage and innovative logistics across these iconic races. Thanks to a constructive commercial collaboration, Kuurne–Brussels–Kuurne is also part of the partnership. We are excited to kick off this collaboration as the spring classics approach. #FLCS #SetThePace

item.title: 🍛🍒🍔🥬 Vil du have din madbod med på Copenhagen Sprint 2026? I samarbejde med Good Boys Agency søger vi passionerede madaktører, der...
item.description: 🍛🍒🍔🥬 Vil du have din madbod med på Copenhagen Sprint 2026? I samarbejde med Good Boys Agency søger vi passionerede madaktører, der vil servere gode måltider til vores cykelfestival. For udover cykelløb i verdensklasse byder Copenhagen Sprint igen i år på en familievenlig cykelfestival med stærkt fokus på bæredygtighed, mangfoldighed og fællesskab. Derfor leder vi efter madkoncepter, der matcher disse værdier og bidrager til en åben, tryg og levende stemning. Vi søger madaktører, der: ✓ Arbejder med bæredygtige valg og gode råvarer 🥗 ✓ Tilbyder mad til mange – inkl. vegetariske og veganske retter samt børnevenlige retter 👧🏻👦🏼 ✓ Kan levere effektiv og imødekommende service i et event med højt tempo 🍔💨 ✓ Har en flot og indbydende madbod, der passer til eventets udtryk 🤩 ✓ Tilbyder rimelige priser og gerne mindst én prisvenlig ret 💸 Læs om rammer og vilkår og udfyld ansøgningsformularen med en kort beskrivelse af dit koncept. Efter modtagelse vender vi tilbage med svar på, om vi kan tilbyde dig en plads. Ansøgningsfrist: 15. marts 2026 👉 Læs rammer og vilkår her: https://lnkd.in/eiYm2W8N 👉 Ansøg her: https://lnkd.in/ewsyhKEm

item.title: Tour de Suisse: Aufbruch ins Neue und Etappenorte 2026
item.description: The Tour de Suisse 2026 marks the beginning of a new era in professional cycling. Women’s and men’s races will take place on the same day and at the same location, contested on circuit courses. This represents a global first, with no comparable format at international level to date. Another premiere follows: for the first […]

item.description: In 2026, we honour all the legends of Kuurne-Brussel-Kuurne. All winners in the junior and elite races. Everyone working behind the scenes who makes KBK possible. And this year, in particular, our late chairman Geert Penez, who shaped KBK into the race it is today. Thank you for making KBK legendary. Kuurne-Brussel-Kuurne. Where Legends Are Honored.

item.title: Hvordan kan vi som events bidrage til den grønne omstilling? 🌱 Det er noget, vi har fokus på , og som vi arbejder på at blive gode...
item.description: Hvordan kan vi som events bidrage til den grønne omstilling? 🌱 Det er noget, vi har fokus på , og som vi arbejder på at blive gode til at tænke ind i de forskellige faser af planlægningen af løbet. I sidste uge arrangerede DanskHåndbold , Bæredygtig Herning og Sport Event Denmark et inspirerende seminar om, hvordan sportsevents kan gå i den rigtige retning, når det gælder den grønne omstilling. Her fortalte vi bl.a. om nogle af de initiativer, vi arbejder med i Copenhagen Sprint. Når forbund, eventsarrangører, værtsbyer, atleter og kommercielle partnere går sammen, kan vi ikke bare spille hinanden gode, vi kan rykke en hel branche i en grønnere retning - et tråd af gangen 🚴🏻♂️🚴♀️

item.title: 🚨Nos offres de l’Espace Signature sont maintenant disponibles! Ne ratez rien de l’action et vivez la 15e édition des Gr...
item.description: 🚨Nos offres de l’Espace Signature sont maintenant disponibles! Ne ratez rien de l’action et vivez la 15e édition des Grands Prix Cyclistes de Québec et de Montréal, les 11 et 13 septembre 2026 : - Vivez l’intensité de la course à quelques mètres de la ligne de départ et d’arrivée; - Suivez la course sur des écrans multiples; - Dégustez des rafraîchissements et une sélection gourmande; - Profitez d’une expérience exclusive et inoubliable ✨ Pour cette 15ᵉ édition, nos forfaits se réinventent avec une nouvelle identité offrant comme toujours une expérience exclusive et distinctive. Découvrez l’Espace Signature et choisissez le forfait qui correspond parfaitement à vos attentes. 🎟️ Réservez votre forfait dès aujourd’hui! 🔗 gpcqm.ca/hospitalite

item.title: Vi kan noget unikt i Danmark, hvor engagerede kommuner og myndigheder deltager aktivt i planlægningen af store sports- og kulturbe...
item.description: Vi kan noget unikt i Danmark, hvor engagerede kommuner og myndigheder deltager aktivt i planlægningen af store sports- og kulturbegivenheder! I går havde vi fællesmøde med alle de kommuner og myndigheder, der er involveret i Copenhagen Sprint. Det var en stor fornøjelse af se opbakningen ved de mange deltagere - og det er noget, vi ikke tager for givet. Tusinde tak til jer alle! Formålet med dagen var at styrke samarbejdet på tværs af kommunegrænser og at skabe en fælles retning omkring løbet og dets afvikling. Copenhagen Sprint 2026 afvikles 13.-14. juni, og I kan godt begynde at glæde jer til en fantastisk weekend i cyklens tegn. Roskilde Kommune Frederiksund Kommune Fredensborg Kommune Ballerup Kommune Københavns Kommune Rødovre Kommune Allerød Kommune Egedal Kommune Hillerød Kommune Furesø Kommune Frederiksberg Kommune Købehavns Politi

item.title: Congratulations to Simon Yates on an outstanding career in the peloton, with highlights including overall victory at bot...
item.description: Congratulations to Simon Yates on an outstanding career in the peloton, with highlights including overall victory at both the Vuelta a España and the Giro d’Italia, multiple Grand Tour stage wins, gold in the points race at the 2013 UCI Track World Championships, and selection to represent Team GB at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. All the best for whatever comes next, Simon 🚴‍♂️💙 📸 Pics 1-7: SWpix.com 📸 Pic 8: Arne Mill/SWpix.com

item.title: Når Copenhagen Sprint vender tilbage 13.–14. juni 2026, bliver det igen med hjælp fra engagerede frivillige
item.description: Når Copenhagen Sprint vender tilbage 13.–14. juni 2026, bliver det igen med hjælp fra engagerede frivillige – og her spiller foreninger og klubber en helt central rolle. Vi søger bl.a. klubber og foreninger, der har lyst til at hjælpe som flagposter, publikumsguider og i andre nøglefunktioner langs ruten. 👉 Læs mere og tilmeld jer her: https://lnkd.in/eTiKRvKv Kender du en forening eller klub, der kunne være interesseret? Deze week brachten we onze partners samen voor de officiële kick-off van E3 Saxo Classic, richting 27 maart 2026. In Panoramix by...
item.description: Deze week brachten we onze partners samen voor de officiële kick-off van E3 Saxo Classic , richting 27 maart 2026. In Panoramix by Callens ontdekten onze partners de nieuwste VIP- & hospitalityformules, werd er druk genetwerkt en luisterden we naar een bijzonder inspirerende keynote van Thomas Van der Plaetsen over hoop, tegenslagen en overwinningen – in de sport én daarbuiten. 🙏 Dank aan alle aanwezige partners voor het vertrouwen en de fijne gesprekken. Samen maken we van E3 Saxo Classic 2026 opnieuw een unieke beleving, zowel langs als óp het parcours. Wil jij er op 27 maart 2026 ook live bij zijn met je relaties of klanten? Ontdek en reserveer onze VIP- & hospitalityformules via https://lnkd.in/e5EkzHVq #E3SaxoClassic #Cycling #Hospitality #Partnerships #VIPExperience

item.title: Spot Cross Atapuerca 2025
À découvrir le 1er novembre sur @cbcgem Découvrez GPCQM – Au-delà de la ligne d’arrivée 🚴‍♂️ Plongez dans les coulisses...
item.description: À découvrir le 1er novembre sur @cbcgem Découvrez GPCQM – Au-delà de la ligne d’arrivée 🚴‍♂️ Plongez dans les coulisses des Grands Prix Cyclistes de Québec et de Montréal, les seules courses UCI WorldTour en Amérique. Ce documentaire immersif dévoile les émotions des athlètes, les défis de l’organisation et l’énergie des foules qui rendent ces événements uniques. Un récit humain vibrant qui prépare l’élan vers les Championnats du Monde Route UCI Montréal 2026. Visionnez la version anglaise sur les ondes de CBC le 1er novembre à 14h30. La version française sera à venir sur les ondes de TVA Sports le 7 décembre. À ne pas manquer 👀 — Premiering November 1st on @cbcgem Discover GPCQM - Stories from the Peloton 🚴‍♂️ Step behind the scenes of the Grands Prix Cyclistes de Québec et de Montréal, North America’s only UCI WorldTour races. This immersive documentary reveals the athletes’ emotions, the organizers’ challenges, and the passion of the fans that make these events unique. A powerful human journey that builds excitement for the UCI Road World Championships Montréal 2026. Watch the English version on CBC on November 1st at 2:30 p.m. The French version will air on TVA Sports on December 7th. Don’t miss it 👀

item.title: Resumen XX Circuito Ciclocross Burgos 2025
Il y a quelques semaines l’édition 2025 des @grandsprixcyclistes a eu lieu et nous avons pour l’occasion organisé un jeu...
item.description: Il y a quelques semaines l’édition 2025 des @grandsprixcyclistes a eu lieu et nous avons pour l’occasion organisé un jeu concours pour faire gagner une machine JURA! Et voici l’heureux gagnant de la S8 à qui nous souhaitons les meilleures dégustations! Un grand merci à toutes et à tous pour votre participation et on vous dit à l’année prochaine 🚴☕️ — A few weeks ago, the 2025 edition of the @grandsprixcyclistes took place, and we organized a contest to win a JURA machine! And here is the lucky winner of the S8, to whom we wish the best tasting experiences!

item.title: Il finale ve lo aspettavate? Mi sa che ce lo aspettavamo tutti🙃 Comunque AMO vivere queste giornate intense di sport co...
item.description: Il finale ve lo aspettavate? Mi sa che ce lo aspettavamo tutti🙃 Comunque AMO vivere queste giornate intense di sport così da vicino e spero di aver trasmesso anche a voi le mie emozioni con questo reel 🥹 Le sensazioni che si provano in una corsa importante come @ilombardia non ve le so descrivere e per non parlare di voi a bordo strada sulla salita della Boccola, da pelle d’oca 🥹 Ma poi vogliamo parlare delle foto che mi avete mandato? Io giuro amo questa community, amo lo sport che ci accomuna in tutte le sue forme❤️ Grazie @castellicycling e @illombardia! Viverla così è stato incredibileee . . . . . #bike #bici #illombardia #bikerace #sportgirl #sport #invited

item.title: 🏆🏆🏆 Avec cette 3ème victoire, 🇮🇹 Matteo Trentin rejoint 🇧🇪 Gustave Danneels, 🇫🇷 Paule Maye, 🇧🇪 Guido Reybrouck et 🇩🇪 Erik Zabel parmi les recordman de victoire sur l'épreuve ! 🏆 🏆🏆 With this third victory, 🇮🇹 Matteo Trentin joins 🇧🇪 Gustave Danneels, 🇫🇷 Paule Maye, 🇧🇪 Guido Reybrouck, and 🇩🇪 Erik Zabel among the record holders for victories in the event! #ParisTours

item.title: Quand le premier et le dernier vainqueur se retrouvent. 🇨🇦🚴‍♂️ @thomasvoeckler_off, premier vainqueur du Grand Prix C...
item.description: Quand le premier et le dernier vainqueur se retrouvent. 🇨🇦🚴‍♂️ @thomasvoeckler_off, premier vainqueur du Grand Prix Cycliste de Québec, et @alafpolak, dernier en date, réunis le temps d’une photo souvenir pendant les Championnats du Monde Route UCI à @kigali2025. Un clin d’œil à l’histoire des Grands Prix Cyclistes — et à la première victoire d’Alaphilippe sous les couleurs de @tudorprocycling. Crédit photo : @yves_perret | @ypmedias | Rob Jones | @tobrook

item.title: Copenhagen Sprint 2026 is rescheduled to 13-14 June
item.description: Copenhagen Sprint returns in 2026 – but on a new date. The race, which was originally scheduled for June 20-21, will be moved forward one week and will be held instead on June 13-14, 2026.

item.title: The Tour de Suisse Evolves
item.description: Men and Women in Parallel: 10 Stages, 5 Days, 2 Races, 1 Experience From 2026 the Tour de Suisse will be presented in a new dynamic format: over five days, two stages will be raced daily – one each for men and women – starting and finishing in the same place. item.title: 🇵🇱 Zwycięzca Tour de Pologne z 2020 roku po raz trzeci z rzędu został mistrzem świata w indywidualnej jeździe na czas 🚴‍♂️🌍. Na wymagającej trasie w Kigali (Rwanda) kolarz Soudal Quick-Step nie dał rywalom szans i sięgnął po złoto, pokazując, że wciąż jest numerem jeden w tej konkurencji. Belg pokonał drugiego Jaya Vine’a o ponad minutę, a jego rodak Ilan Van Wilder uzupełnił podium. To kolejne potwierdzenie, że Evenepoel zapisuje się w historii kolarstwa jako prawdziwy król czasówki. @GrupaORLEN #TourdePologne #RemcoEvenepoel #Cycling #WorldChampion #RoadWorlds2025 #Kigali 🇬🇧 The 2020 Tour de Pologne winner has just claimed his third consecutive World Championship title in the individ
item.description: 🇵🇱 Zwycięzca Tour de Pologne z 2020 roku po raz trzeci z rzędu został mistrzem świata w indywidualnej jeździe na czas 🚴‍♂️🌍. Na wymagającej trasie w Kigali (Rwanda) kolarz Soudal Quick-Step nie dał rywalom szans i sięgnął po złoto, pokazując, że wciąż jest numerem jeden w tej konkurencji. Belg pokonał drugiego Jaya Vine’a o ponad minutę, a jego rodak Ilan Van Wilder uzupełnił podium. To kolejne potwierdzenie, że Evenepoel zapisuje się w historii kolarstwa jako prawdziwy król czasówki. @GrupaORLEN #TourdePologne #RemcoEvenepoel #Cycling #WorldChampion #RoadWorlds2025 #Kigali 🇬🇧 The 2020 Tour de Pologne winner has just claimed his third consecutive World Championship title in the individual time trial 🚴‍♂️🌍. On the demanding course in Kigali (Rwanda), the Soudal Quick-Step rider was unstoppable, showing that he is still number one in this discipline. He finished more than a minute ahead of Jay Vine, with fellow Belgian Ilan Van Wilder taking third place. Once again, Evenepoel proves he’s a true time trial king making cycling history. @orlen #TourdePologne #RemcoEvenepoel #Cycling #WorldChampion #RoadWorlds2025 #Kigali — Tour de Pologne (@Tour_de_Pologne) Sep 22, 2025

item.title: Arnaud De Lie wins Leuven thriller to claim overall victory in the 20th Renewi Tour
item.description: What a breathtaking finale to the Renewi Tour! For much of the day it looked like Mathieu van der Poel would claim overall victory, but in the closing metres it was Arnaud De Lie (Lotto Dstny) who launched a devastating sprint. The Belgian not only won the stage in Leuven but also secured the overall […]

Merlier claims second stage win in Bilzen-Hoeselt, De Lie stays in yellow
item.description: Stage four of the Renewi Tour brought another sprint finish, and once again European Champion Tim Merlier (Soudal–Quick Step) proved the fastest. On the uphill drag to Hoeselt, he surged past Pavel Bittner and Olav Kooij to take his 14th victory of the season. Arnaud De Lie retains the leader’s jersey with a slim one-second […]

item.title: From Riemst to Bilzen-Hoeselt on the fourth day. A fast day through the hills ended with another bunch sprint, and a second European champ win. 🌠 #RenewiTour #GoWithGolazo

item.title: Van der Poel conquers Geraardsbergen, De Lie gets leader’s jersey
item.description: After two sprint stages, the Renewi Tour tackled its queen stage in and around Geraardsbergen. On the iconic cobbled Vesten climb, Mathieu van der Poel (Alpecin-Deceuninck) outpowered Arnaud De Lie (Lotto Dstny) in a thrilling finale. The Belgian champion Tim Wellens finished third. The race came to life early as the GC contenders took control […]

Olav Kooij powers to victory in Ardooie, Merlier stays in yellow
item.description: Stage two of the Renewi Tour, raced on Belgian soil, delivered another bunch sprint despite crosswinds and repeated splits in the peloton. European Champion Tim Merlier looked set for back-to-back wins, but it was Olav Kooij (Visma | Lease a Bike) who unleashed a powerful final kick to take the stage victory. Pavel Bittner finished […]

item.description: The 2025 Renewi Tour kicked off with a bunch sprint as expected, but the road to the finish line was anything but straightforward. Wind, echelons and a determined breakaway made for a tense opening stage. In the end, European Champion Tim Merlier (Soudal–Quick Step) powered to his 13th win of the season, ahead of Arnaud […]

Final weekend in Vaduz postponed to 2027
item.description: The final weekend of the Tour de Suisse Men in Vaduz, originally planned for 2026, will be postponed by one year and will now take place in June 2027. Tour Director Olivier Senn explains the decision as follows: “The stage planning for 2026 and the associated logistical challenges have prompted us to request a postponement […]

item.title: Al via la tre giorni Strade Bianche a Siena
item.description: The Strade Bianche Crédit Agricole returns tomorrow, the "Northern Classic in the South of Europe," marking the start of Italy’s major cycling events organized by RCS Sports & Events.
